programme.desc: Peg and Cat help Peg’s Grandmom create a groovy birthday present for Granddad based on his favorite numbers, the sixties. Later, when Bad Jack returns to tickle the townspeople, a surprise guest shows Peg and Cat how to fend off the bad guys.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel Shares His Tigertastic Car/ Katerina Shares Her Tutu
programme.desc: Daniel and his friends struggle to share a car; Daniel and Katerina disagree.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Cookie Monster's Museum Mystery
programme.desc: Cookie Monster is blamed when paintings begin to disappear from the Museum of Modern Cookie.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Mr. Socko/ A Pinkapurrfect Pet
programme.desc: Peter is missing one of his lucky socks! Pinkalicious creates a sock puppet and retraces his steps.

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Desserts
programme.desc: The bakers start off with an array of rich tortes in the Signature challenge. They then face the Technical, creme caramel; for some, there's more wobble than expected. The six-hour Showstopper is a mighty layered meringue.

programme.title: Nature: Naledi: One Little Elephant
programme.desc: Born in a rescue camp in the wilderness of Botswana, Naledi the baby elephant loses her mother and faces the world alone. It is now up to a devoted team of caretakers and researchers to urge Naledi to survive and help her find her place in the herd.

programme.title: Blood Sugar Rising
programme.desc: The history and science of diabetes, an epidemic that affects 100 million Americans, is explored.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: King and Crystal Play Red Rock/ Nick of Time
programme.desc: King and Crystal Cryolophosaurus get an offer to perform music at the Red Rock Amphitheatre.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: A Long Winter's Nap/ The Tree Doctor
programme.desc: Sally and Nick are so excited to go ice-skating tomorrow that they can't fall asleep. They learn how Boris gets ready for his long winter's nap. Then, Sally's little maple sapling hasn't grown, so they go to meet Mr. Twiggles.

programme.title: NCIS: Revenge
programme.desc: In retaliation for the murders of Eli David and Jackie Vance, the NCIS team feverishly searches for Bodnar despite orders from Homeland Security to relinquish the case.

programme.title: NCIS: Double Blind
programme.desc: A Department of Defense investigator scrutinizes the NCIS team’s response to the Bodnar case involving the murder of Ziva’s father and Vance’s wife.

programme.title: NCIS: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: The international manhunt for Eli David's killer turns into a federal witch hunt against Gibbs and the team, which questions their unconventional methods and threatens their future at the agency.

programme.title: NCIS: Whiskey Tango Foxtrot
programme.desc: An explosion at a D.C. event that results in a casualty connected to the agency changes Parsons' perspective on Gibbs and the NCIS team. Meanwhile, without badges, DiNozzo and McGee investigate the case as civilians.

programme.title: NCIS: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: A covert identity created for one of Gibbs' undercover cases 20 years ago resurfaces after a murder victim is found living under the alias.

programme.title: WWE NXT
programme.desc: A unique acrobatic and theatrically aggressive presentation of wrestling.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Forgiving Rollins

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Intimidation Game
programme.desc: When a female employee is assaulted at a gamer convention, Detective Tutuola investigates the crime. A female game developer refuses to delay her game launch, and the cops must 'level up' to protect her.

programme.title: Modern Family: Games People Play
programme.desc: Phil gets a brand new RV with high hopes of going on a fun family road trip. Claire decides to let him learn the hard way why this will likely be a terrible idea.

programme.title: Modern Family: Suddenly, Last Summer

programme.title: Modern Family: Larry's Wife
programme.desc: Phil seems to have found his wheelhouse in real estate with recently divorced women, but it's taking up a lot of his time. Meanwhile, Luke invites his buddies over for a high-stakes poker game in the basement.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Savant
programme.desc: Ben Nicholson finds his wife Corrine beaten into a coma, and the only witness to the crime is their mentally challenged daughter, Katie. Because of Katie's sensitive mental state, the detectives are reluctant to have her testify.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Harm
programme.desc: When a private school teacher is found stabbed to death, the detectives link her case to a victim's centre.

programme.title: Dateline: Deep in the Woods

programme.title: Dateline: The Other Side of Paradise

programme.title: Frasier: Dr. Nora

programme.title: Frasier: When a Man Loves Two Women

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Mr. and Mrs. TV Show

programme.desc: Lucy mistakes a talent scout for a masher and nearly ruins Ricky's chances at a career.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's Screen Test
programme.desc: The cameras roll for Ricky's screen test, but when the moment arrives Lucy takes the cue.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy's Mother-in-Law

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide

programme.desc: A young interior designer learns that her father has broken his leg and needs her help on his tulip farm. When she returns home, she is forced to face the demons of her past in order to help out the family business.

programme.title: Movie: The Convenient Groom

programme.title: South Park: Ass Burgers

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub

programme.title: Military Makeover: Hixon Family Makeover
programme.desc: Homes and lives of veterans across the country are transformed by a team of experts.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo
programme.desc: When Carrie learns that Deacon and Kelly bought a second home, she convinces Doug that they were able to afford it because they are so cheap.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mild Bunch
programme.desc: A prank runs amok when Doug and his pal reunite at their 20th high school reunion and decide to have some fun with their old principal.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Manhattan Project
programme.desc: When an apartment becomes available in Manhattan, Carrie finally sees her dream of living in the city coming true but Doug has different plans and the two quickly realize they share a different outlook on the future.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Single Spaced
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie visit their priest for some marriage counselling, they run into friends who recently had a child, which causes both of them to think about adopting a baby.

programme.title: The King of Queens: China Syndrome
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's marriage continues to be on the rocks when Doug learns that Carrie didn't get rid of her apartment. Both need to set aside their differences when they receive an unexpected phone call that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: The King of Queens: China Syndrome
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's marriage continues to be on the rocks when Doug learns that Carrie didn't get rid of her apartment. Both need to set aside their differences when they receive an unexpected phone call that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pilot
programme.desc: Doug is the envy of his neighbourhood when Carrie surprises him with a big-screen TV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fat City
programme.desc: Doug is worried that Carrie has put on a few pounds and may wind up resembling her mother.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cello, Goodbye
programme.desc: Doug worries when Carrie's new job in a posh Manhattan law firm keeps her working late.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Richie's Song
programme.desc: Carrie refuses to double date with Richie and his obnoxious cheating wife, Marie.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Family Lies
programme.desc: After a family of six is found brutally murdered in a rural Texas town, a perpetrator confesses to the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Ride to the Rescue
programme.desc: A Sacramento law student is convicted after a brutal home invasion and murder. Her cause seems lost until Joyce Ride, mother of Sally Ride, becomes intrigued with the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Two construction workers are brutally attacked in San Antonio, but one survives and is able to identify his assailant.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Sex and Murder: Sugar Daddy Death
programme.desc: A married Google executive is found dead on his luxury yacht, those close to him are left baffled when the autopsy results are released. The only clue into Forrest Hayes’ death is a sexy woman seen on the boat’s surveillance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunting Vampires
programme.desc: Josh explores the history of vampirism in Romania and Bulgaria.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Return of the Yeti
programme.desc: Beginning in Kathmandu, Josh Gates heads high into the Himalayas of Nepal to obtain scientific evidence of the legendary Yeti. This time his mission is personal, and it will take him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Extra Finds: The Monster and the Mountain
programme.desc: Josh ascends higher into the Himalayas to explore caves, examine ancient artifacts, and investigate the mystical ties the legendary creature holds with the Nepalese people.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Hunt for the Yeti
programme.desc: Josh Gates' quest takes him from the frozen slopes of Mount Everest to the isolated forests of Bhutan, where Josh uses bait to force a more personal encounter with the creature and capture some of his best evidence yet.

programme.title: Legends of the Wild: Fear in the Philippines
programme.desc: A look at whether disappearances of villagers and livestock could be from a jungle predator.

programme.desc: Exploring from the safety of his home, Josh shares updates and unseen footage from his adventures hunting the mysterious mountain-dwelling Yeti. Then, Dave Turin of Dave Turin's Lost Mine joins in to discuss his epic season finale and winter's challenges.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Tracking Tasmania's Tiger
programme.desc: Josh ventures to Australia's island state of Tasmania to investigate sightings of the supposedly extinct Thylacine, also known as the Tasmanian tiger.

programme.title: MythBusters: Supersonic Ping Pong/ Ice Cannon

programme.title: MythBusters: Trench Torpedo
programme.desc: The guys test a war myth to see if a trench corner can slow down a shockwave and save a soldier.

programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: It's Personal With Amy Hoggart: Shame
programme.desc: Lighting director Kevin struggles with shame over not voting in the 2016 election. He's lied to everyone about it and living with the lie is now a nightmare. Amy devises a theatrical solution to help lower the final curtain on his shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Find out which joker once included inline skating as a skill on his resume, who was a mathlete and a bowler in high school and which joker was afraid of the dark as a child.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: It's Personal With Amy Hoggart: Shame
programme.desc: Lighting director Kevin struggles with shame over not voting in the 2016 election. He's lied to everyone about it and living with the lie is now a nightmare. Amy devises a theatrical solution to help lower the final curtain on his shame.

programme.desc: Nine-year-old Matthew is tired of his dad's nonstop teasing. Amy seeks help from a Marine sniper to plan a sneak attack at a family barbecue to give Matthew a taste of payback but he learns that revenge is a dish best served not at all.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Simply The Best
programme.desc: Ree's sharing her ideas of the best things in the world.

programme.title: Chopped: B.L.D.: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner!
programme.desc: The chefs set out to make a whole day's worth of amazing food when the cooking rounds are changed to breakfast, lunch and dinner. The judges hope the chefs who make it to the final round will be able to make lamb dinners to remember.

programme.title: Chopped: Give It a Nest!
programme.desc: Four bold contenders’ stride into the Chopped Kitchen with winning on their minds. If the tri-tip in the first basket doesn't trip them up, the edible bird's nest just might. Stinging nettles threaten to hurt the competitors' chances for success.

programme.title: Chopped: Hot Dog Hotshots
programme.desc: The chefs gear up for an epic hot dog battle in a nonstop celebration of the phenomenal frankfurter. In the appetizer basket, they discover a hot dog creation that takes the prized piece of Americana to another level.

programme.title: Chopped: Frying Times
programme.desc: In this competition the chefs learn they will have to fry something in every course. A decadent finger good and a protein-packed shocker challenges the chefs in the entree basket while a cookie and sundae join the frying dessert round.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Queen Returns
programme.desc: Culinary queen Martha Stewart returns with Iron Chef Michael Symon to defeat Bobby Flay. They bring in two young guns, brunch queen Sarah Wade and sous chef Max Castro, to see if Bobby can keep up with the future food generation.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: This Just In!
programme.desc: News anchor Don Lemon and Chef Alex Guarnaschelli have a news flash: Bobby Flay is going down! They bring in two award-winning chefs, Dieter Samijn of Bar Boulud and Patrick Schaeffer of Citi Field.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pretty Little Fryer
programme.desc: Best Baker in America's Scott Conant teams up with actress Sasha Pieterse to get the truth and a loss out of Bobby Flay. They get a little help from talented farm-to-table chef Anthony Lo Pinto and seafood maven Franco Robazetti.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Perched for Victory
programme.desc: Worst Cooks in America's Anne Burrell gets a little help from her friend Valerie Bertinelli on the mission to bring down Bobby Flay. They recruit Napa Valley's Elizabeth Binder and Washington, D.C.'s Mike Ellis to help them.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Guess Who's Back?
programme.desc: Two chefs want another shot at Bobby. Fine-dining chef Ryan Lory and Italian chef Jackie Rothong are back for redemption, and they've got Chef Josh Capon and Katie Lee in their corner as they seek sweet revenge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: This'll Stick in Your Craw
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Hawaiian chef Jojo Vasquez tangles with Nashville's Brian Riggenbach for the ultimate chance to one-up Bobby Flay in his own kitchen. Sunny Anderson and Clinton Kelly are here to make sure no one plays nice.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Danger at Dawn
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Benny Richards is committed to conserving Texas wildlife. Game Warden Albert Flores enforces fishing laws. Game Warden Jennifer Provaznik schools anglers. Game Warden Jayme Deschaaf makes sure dove hunters follow the laws.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Seeing Stars and Stripes
programme.desc: It's summertime in Texas. Game Wardens handle a speeding jet ski, drunk boaters, angry campers, and a rowdy raccoon.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Justice Served
programme.desc: Game Wardens stay busy patrolling all over the state of Texas. On Lake Sam Rayburn, a water patrol turns into a cry for help. The wardens serve a warrant to a man who illegally shot a hog. A drug arrest leads a game warden into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Alligator Showdown
programme.desc: When a friendly alligator swims to the local yacht club, it's up to Warden Boone to remove it. Then, a father and son are attacked by an alligator, and wardens are determined to catch it, while a deer is left trapped on private property.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Hunting Hunters
programme.desc: Across Texas, the wardens enforce the law during prime deer season. Bad weather conditions lead to a serious car wreck. A tipster reports an injured owl. A hunter harassment issue between neighbors is addressed. Illegal deer disposals are investigated.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Busted, Boozing and Boating
programme.desc: The Texas Game Wardens are in the thick of the prime outdoor season which means plenty of revelers on land and on water. A few groups of suspects may be having too much of a good time.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for the illusive big horn sheep in the mountains of West Texas. A family near Houston reports shots from a neighboring ranch are raining down on their home. Wardens track down a bow hunter, incriminated by his own game camera.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Out for Blood

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator vs. Game Warden

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Border Bust

programme.title: Swamp People: Lethal Encounters
programme.desc: Over the years, alligator hunters in the swamps of Southern Louisiana have risked both life and limb to fill their tags. And while everyday on the swamp presents a new fight, there are a select few encounters that stand out from the rest.

programme.title: Swamp People: Ten Most Dangerous Moments
programme.desc: A countdown of the most treacherous gator battles, hair-raising close calls and near-death moments of the past seven seasons.

programme.title: Swamp People: Raging Bulls
programme.desc: The swampers employ risky tactics to target giant breeding bulls in order to cull the exploding gator population. Joey and Zak create a feeding frenzy, while a gator takes a bite out of Ashley and Ronnie.

programme.title: Swamp People: Return to Froggy Bayou
programme.desc: Joey and Zak stake out game trails to capture deer-eating gators. Ronnie recruits Terral after being sabotaged by angry locals. Meanwhile, Troy tests his new deckhand's patience while Daniel and Big Tee get creative with their bait.

programme.title: Swamp People: The Champ
programme.desc: Troy and Terral protect a friend's fish camp with the help of a sniper. Meanwhile, the Edwards go toe-to-toe with 'The Champ' a heavyweight gator. Deadeye Jones puts her Daddy's gun to the test.

programme.title: Swamp People: Mystery in the Bayou
programme.desc: Troy and Terral use a radical new strategy to catch gators, while Jacob's new deckhand proves his worth. Joey and Zak stalk a monster bull.

programme.title: Swamp People: Bad Banana
programme.desc: Brock and Aaron gamble on a new hunting area, while 70-year-old Daniel goes on a solo hunt. Joey and Zak take on a mission to catch a monster threatening a local neighborhood.

programme.title: Swamp People: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: On Friday the 13th, Daniel and Big Tee chase a bait-stealing monster known as 'The Ghost'. Meanwhile, Willie and his son brave the waters of 'The Graveyard'.

programme.title: Swamp People: Deadeye Driver
programme.desc: Daniel and Big Tee face off against trespassers, while Troy learns new tricks from an old timer. Meanwhile, Aaron and Brock get lost in the Bayou backwaters while Ronnie and Ashley navigate dueling airboats.

programme.title: Swamp People: Airboat Armada
programme.desc: Troy assembles a crew to infiltrate Cow Island. Ronnie and Ashley assist the Landrys with an armada of airboats. Brock and Aaron chase their biggest beast of the season: Dr. Steel. Then, invasive Burmese pythons are taking over the everglades.

programme.title: Movie: Swing Time
programme.desc: To prove himself worthy of his fiancee, a dancer tries to make it big, only to fall for his dancing partner.

programme.title: Movie: Top Hat
programme.desc: While vacationing in London and Venice, a wealthy woman falls in love with an American man she mistakenly believes is her best friend's husband.

programme.title: Movie: Dark Victory
programme.desc: A selfish socialite falls for her doctor after learning that she has a brain tumour.

programme.title: Movie: No Way Out
programme.desc: A racist criminal wreaks vengeance on the black community for the death of his brother.

programme.title: Movie: Coma
programme.desc: A resident surgeon at Boston Memorial Hospital initiates her own investigation into the irreparable brain damage her best friend suffers during a minor operation. She soon suspects a conspiracy after discovering similarities among patients.

programme.title: Movie: The Young Dr. Kildare
programme.desc: A young doctor gets into trouble after a prominent patient dies.

programme.title: Movie: The Citadel
programme.desc: A young doctor opens his first practice in a Welsh mining town and tries to determine why the miners all cough. When thwarted in this, he moves to London and scams wealthy hypochondriacs. Eventually, he learns what it means to be a real doctor.

programme.title: Movie: Don't Go Near the Water
programme.desc: The U.S. Navy press corps tries to keep things lively on a remote South Pacific island.

programme.title: Movie: The Narrow Corner
programme.desc: A fugitive wanted for murder escapes to the East Indies and brings misfortune to others.

programme.title: Movie: The Little Hut
programme.desc: A busy businessman takes his beautiful wife for granted. When the couple along with their best friend (a man) are marooned on a desert island, the sexual tension reaches a peak.

programme.title: Movie: Lost Continent
programme.desc: Joe Nolan heads a rescue mission in the South Pacific in search of a downed atomic rocket. The crew face problems when their plane crash-lands on an island where they encounter a native girl and face giant lizards and realistic looking dinosaurs.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Robin Crusoe
programme.desc: The survivor of a shipwreck is washed ashore a deserted island and fights for her life.

programme.title: Movie: Last Of The Pagans
programme.desc: Dozens of natives are exploited by the white owners of a tin mine in the South Seas.

programme.title: Movie: From Hell it Came
programme.desc: A falsely executed South Seas islander returns as an evil tree stump.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Swimming Fool/ Tilly's Goat
programme.desc: When the Greens visit an indoor pool, Cricket is challenged to jump off the high-dive. Tilly claims that their goat has the spirit of a dog and enters it in a dog show.

programme.desc: Finn, Matteo, and Destiny fix up an old car as a present for Lou’s 10-year anniversary at Camp Kikiwaka. Emma, Ravi, and Zuri decide to throw Lou a surprise party.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Weirder Things
programme.desc: The kids win a contest to go to a private screening of their favorite TV show.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Missteps
programme.desc: Nia and Tess decide to form their own step squad.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: The People vs. Blair Bennett
programme.desc: Blair is accused of vandalism at school, and is put on trial in 'school court'. Owen acts as her defense attorney, while Ruth is assigned to the prosecution.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Crybaby Duran
programme.desc: When Gabby hears a rumour about herself going around at school, she uses a telepathic alien to find out who started it, jeopardizing the alien in the process.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Put a Sock in It?
programme.desc: In his dad's absence, Cooper starts to take on projects around the house only to find out he is a horrible handy man and Cami has been fixing his mistakes secretly.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: As Bad As She Gets
programme.desc: Sydney surprises her dad Max for his birthday by inviting his childhood best friend Leo and his son to visit from San Francisco.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Smells Like Camp Spirit
programme.desc: Emma and Xander lose the camp spirit stick, which curses the campers with bad luck. Meanwhile, Jorge and Tiffany try to teach Ravi how to swim.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Can You Hear Me Now

programme.title: Jessie: 101 Lizards
programme.desc: When Ravi realizes he can't care for Ms. Kipling and 12 baby lizards, a slew of misunderstandings ensues, leading Jessie and kids to think that Ms. Chesterfield hired someone to turn them into belts and purses.

programme.title: Jessie: The Trouble With Tessie

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Falcon and the Raven
programme.desc: After having a vision of his mom losing her hidden money, Booker asks Nia and Levi to assist him in following Raven, hoping to stop the money from going missing.

programme.title: Raven's Home: What About Your Friends?
programme.desc: When Booker’s new friends try to influence him to try vaping, he turns them down, however later takes the fall when they get caught and claim that the vape pen belongs to Booker.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Sister Pact

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Lose a Luau?

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Ask-Her-More-A-Rooney

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Friend-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv is not too happy when Joey lands a part on 'Voltage'. Meanwhile, when Karen finds out that Andie's dad, Mr. Bustamante, disapproves of Dump Truck, they team up to change his mind.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Ridgewood-A-Rooney
programme.desc: When Parker gets bumped up a few grades, he starts attending high school with Liv, Maddie and Joey! The older siblings now have to deal with him being good at everything.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dancing Tween
programme.desc: While Booker and Tess team up to plan their sixth grade dance, Nia worries her dancing skills aren't good enough for the big event. Meanwhile, Raven starts to question if she's being a good mom and goes overboard trying to volunteer for the kids' school.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Vending the Rules
programme.desc: When Booker and Levi want expensive virtual reality goggles, the boys come up with a plan to make money by selling snacks at school.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: One Unicorny Day!/ The Happy Horse Helpers!
programme.desc: When a horse gets a traffic cone stuck on her head and is sprayed with sparkly paint, the townsfolk think they've seen a real unicorn.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.desc: After a bed-ridden former police officer is executed in his own home, police rely on his wife's testimony to bring the murderer to justice.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Will Hurley
programme.desc: A team of retired detectives travels to Boston to investigate the 2009 death of a young Navy veteran. The victim's girlfriend spoke to him just minutes before he vanished and the team believes his death could be the work of the Smiley Face Killers.

programme.title: Smiley Face Killers: The Hunt For Justice: Tommy Booth

programme.title: Paradise Islands: Born of Fire
programme.desc: The islands of Indonesia, Malaysia and New Guinea are the biologically richest on earth. There are tigers and elephants, rhinos and birds of paradise. But why this profusion of life? Follow the story of the islands, from their violent and fiery birth.

programme.title: Paradise Islands: Creatures of the Moon
programme.desc: The reefs and coastal forests, beaches and shallow waters of the Paradise Islands are amongst the richest on Earth. This is a world under the sway of the moon. Creatures such as proboscis monkeys, fiddler crabs and whale sharks move to the moon's rhythm.

programme.title: Paradise Islands: Sun Kings
programme.desc: The Paradise Islands stretch along the equator, with tropical sun driving life on these islands. They are home to the oldest, richest rainforests on Earth. The sunlit canopy is home to gibbons and hornbills, while tigers and rhinos roam the forest floor.

programme.title: Where Oceans Collide
programme.desc: The ocean is home to some of the most diverse wildlife in the world.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Giants of the Deep

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Sand Wars
programme.desc: Discover the multitudes of bizarre creatures that make the sandy plains of the seabed their home.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring
programme.desc: As spring lights up the land, Alaska faces the greatest transformation on earth. Temperatures soar, and as the sun hits the snow and ice, water, light and warmth return.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Iceland is a land born out of fire, sculpted by ice. This unique island is home to some of the planet’s rarest and most spectacular creatures and harbours some of the most extreme environments on Earth.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Taiga: The Frozen Forest
programme.desc: Follow a year in the Taiga Forest, a frozen forest containing one third of the world's tree that spans right around the globe: across North America, Scandinavia, and extending across Siberia to the shores of the Pacific, sheltering majestic animals.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: The Tundra: Desert of Ice
programme.desc: Covering 1/5th of the earth's surface, the arctic tundra is one of the coldest and driest places on the planet. The piercing sub-zero temperatures and powerful winds of the arctic tundra challenges even the hardiest of creatures.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Giants: US Navy Super Fleet
programme.desc: The world's toughest naval fleet are put to the test as cutting-edge aircraft carriers, combat ships, and amphibious assault vehicles and their crews undergo challenging warfare exercises.

programme.desc: Special access inside one of the world's fastest catamarans reveals the secrets of a high-speed, hi-tech monster ferry that uses the power of 50 Formula One cars to conquer some of the roughest seas on earth.

programme.desc: The USNS Comfort is the world's biggest hospital ship and a vital tool in New York City's fight against the COVID-19 pandemic. This hi-tech vessel helps world-class doctors and nurses bring cutting-edge medicine to hot spots all over the world.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Omen of Blood River
programme.desc: When a river of blood washes through a city's streets, some witnesses believe it's a warning of doomsday. A strange perfect circle emerges in the clouds about California, and some experts speculate that it's evidence of alien activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Pride

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Sister Load
programme.desc: The seizure of 350 pounds of marijuana leads the unit to a similar sister load coming from Mexico.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Third Time's a Charm
programme.desc: Detectives are determined to take down Quack, one of Laredo's most notorious heroin dealers.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Show Me the Money
programme.desc: Roly goes undercover to nab a top cocaine and heroin dealer, whose most recent crime involved shooting an officer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The New C
programme.desc: A new informant is willing to give up vital information about dealers in exchange for help with his legal troubles.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Candyman
programme.desc: A series of controlled buys leads detectives to the house of a local dealer.

programme.title: Crime 360: Senseless
programme.desc: Two adults and four young children were killed during a gunfight. Spent bullets, shell casings and a missing neighbour all hold clues to the family massacre.

programme.title: Crime 360: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A coroner finds that a victim's body shows signs of blunt force trauma to the head.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: It's love at first sight for 19-year-old Ashleigh Lindsey when she is introduced to Josh Mahaffey by his roommate Scott. But when she decides to move in with her new man, it soon becomes clear there's not room for all three of them under one roof.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Into the Wild
programme.desc: While out for a run in the Montana wilderness, 22-year-old college student Kari Swensen is taken prisoner by two mountain men. When she learns of their twisted plans for her, she'll do everything she can to escape or die trying.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Black Widow
programme.desc: Gary Taylor knows what people say about Catherine Mehaffey. Still, when he finally meets the sexy lawyer, he just can't stay away. But it's only a matter of time before Gary realizes he's made a grave mistake and breaking things off won't come easy.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to Be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: All That It Seems
programme.desc: Documenting how surveillance cameras assist with solving crime in America.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Air McNair
programme.desc: Retired NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death along with his young mistress. Pat Postigilone reveals the true story of his investigation and its shocking conclusion, which has become the most talked about murder mystery in Nashville history.

programme.title: Body Cam: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Arkansas officers are pinned down by a deadly gunman for four hours. Then, in Oklahoma City, officers fear an ambush when a suspect bails from a stolen pick-up truck.

programme.title: See No Evil: All That It Seems
programme.desc: Documenting how surveillance cameras assist with solving crime in America.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Air McNair
programme.desc: Retired NFL superstar Steve McNair is found shot to death along with his young mistress. Pat Postigilone reveals the true story of his investigation and its shocking conclusion, which has become the most talked about murder mystery in Nashville history.

programme.title: Body Cam: Shots Fired
programme.desc: A domestic dispute turns into a hostage situation with children's lives at stake; an apparent vehicle accident turns into a shocking multiple murder with armed killers on the run; a disturbance at a liquor store leaves an officer fighting for his life.

programme.title: See No Evil: Right Man, Wrong Man
programme.desc: On June 12th 2013, family man Richard Arenas is gunned down in broad daylight in the driveway of his suburban home with no apparent motive or witnesses.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: A Deceitful Heart
programme.desc: When Michael Lee Smith's body is found shot, partially nude, and dumped on the side of the road, the town of Berkley, Michigan is scandalized. Police are forced to sift through lies and alibis as they attempt to track down the killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Little Girl Gone
programme.desc: In 1988, a nine year-old girl goes missing in Great Falls, Montana. Years after the case goes cold, a chance bus stop encounter breathes new life into the investigation, leading detectives to the horrifying truth behind the girl's disappearance.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Dead End Trail
programme.desc: Fear grips the students of Southern Illinois University when the violated body of senior Susan Schumake is discovered near a popular campus trail. Years of tireless investigation finally reveals a remorseless killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Death and Taxes
programme.desc: When a successful tax attorney is found strangled to death on his Ft. Pierce, Florida property, detectives scrutinize jealous boyfriends, deadbeat tenants, and delinquent clients on their way to finding their killer.

programme.title: Deadly Dentists: Concealed Abscess
programme.desc: Dr. Glenn Engleman has been caring for his South St. Louis neighbors for decades, even though crime is increasing in the area. When several people close to him are killed, detectives soon discover there's more going on in Engleman's world than it seemed.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Your Biggest Fan
programme.desc: Listen to the story of actress Rebecca Schaeffer, her life cut short at the age of 21 by a stalker. 30 years later, those who knew Rebecca speak about the daughter, actress and friend she was; her hopes and dreams; and the enduring high price of fame.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Your Biggest Fan

programme.title: See No Evil: Captain Freddy
programme.desc: On August 15th 2015, police are alerted to the body of Fernando Silva on a boat. With the crime scene revealing little about what caused his death, police turn to surveillance footage for clues.

programme.title: See No Evil: Good Samaritan
programme.desc: Bright young college student Kenia Monge disappears without a trace. The family's search for their 19-year-old daughter hits every dead end... until detectives uncover chilling surveillance footage, revealing exactly what happened to her.

programme.title: See No Evil: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Police investigate the strange disappearance of a reporter in Pensacola, FL who was involved in the world of gaming, and a mother disappears across state. Cameras shed light on these two cases.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Megan
programme.desc: When a teenager goes missing from her local Walmart, detectives struggle for leads. But then surveillance cameras reveal terrifying footage of a prowler kidnapping her, transforming this investigation into a desperate race to bring her home alive.

programme.title: See No Evil: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: On October 26th, 2009, widower Philip Gatusso is murdered in the quiet town of Fargo, North Dakota. As his in-laws drive across states to care for their now orphaned granddaughter, detectives to turn to a witness that never sleeps - surveillance video.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Beachfront or Bust in Myrtle Beach
programme.desc: Brad grew up spending summers in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Now he's ready to find a vacation home for his family, and local broker Jason Moore is just the man to help them find it, along with some help from his wife and kids.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Full-on Fixer-Upper in St. Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Steve and Stacie just moved to St. Pete Beach, Florida, and are looking to put down some roots. They find their perfect beachside home but it needs a ton of work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Supersizing in St. Petersburg, Florida
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple loves their Florida lifestyle and desires to be on the water in St. Petersburg, which means they must take on a renovation project.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories in Maryland
programme.desc: Frequent visitors to the popular beach town of Ocean City, MD, decide to take a big chance and invest in property for their family.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Flawed to Flawless
programme.desc: A Franklin, TN, couple enlists the Pool Kings to build their dream pool in their very challenging backyard.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kinds design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tuscan Wonderwall
programme.desc: The Pool Kings are faced with a dilapidated 1980s-style pool and a family that wants a beautiful yard where they can cook outside. They rip out the old pool and build a Tuscan beauty with multiple overflows and glass detail work.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Build the Pool and They Will Come
programme.desc: Grandparents want an irresistible pool to ensure the grandkids will want to spend plenty of time at their new place. Steve and Justin come through with a beautiful raised pool design featuring a huge deck that triples the entertaining space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hidden Treasures
programme.desc: A little known Hawaiian pork dish and a super sized slice of bacon are well-kept secrets.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Last Supper
programme.desc: Stars talk about meals to die for including duck and smoky sweet BBQ pork.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory
programme.desc: Scott Conant shows Michael his favourite burger and brew bar in an out-of-the-way corner of New Orleans, and then in Kansas City, Michael learns how two brother have stormed the classic barbecue scene with their award winning smoked meat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meatloaded Makeovers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon starts with Vietnamese fusion dishes like juicy, tender shaking beef and mini shrimp-stuffed pancakes. In Colorado Springs, an Asian-inspired duck burger gets a wonton topper, and a meaty take on a classic PB and J.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is on the hunt for the most radical barbecue rigs, and he starts at The Pit Room in Houston, Texas, where special events call for a custom-built trailer that can cook up to 600 pounds of meat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hollywood
programme.desc: Andrew explores legendary hotspots and diverse culinary treasures in Hollywood, California. He highlights classic steak and martinis, Thai steamed whole fish, Armenian flatbread topped with minced beef and Persian ice cream.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris
programme.desc: In the city of love, Andrew Zimmern explores the delicious delicacies of Paris, France; from the indulgent steak frites and the croque monsieur, to the baked croissant and baguette, to the sweet macaroons and savory crepes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Barcelona
programme.desc: Andrew takes us to Barcelona, a coastal city that draws its edible inspiration directly from the mountains and sea. From tapas to crema Catalana, the foods of this Mediterranean city reflect history and culture in every bite.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is on the hunt for the most radical barbecue rigs, and he starts at The Pit Room in Houston, Texas, where special events call for a custom-built trailer that can cook up to 600 pounds of meat.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Wine Country Weekend

programme.title: Unique Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: These restaurants have quickly become famous food destinations and local legends. Ogunquit, Maine, Cleveland Ohio, Baltimore Maryland, and San Francisco. Unique and pioneering dishes that turn first time costumers into long-time fans.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Dirt Cheap and Delicious
programme.desc: You don't need to sacrifice taste to eat cheap at these joints. Pulled pork PBLT and squash dumplings and outdoor food market with BBQ and biscuits.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Chicken
programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America in search of the 12 very best chicken dishes. From frying and baking to grilling, Roger is hanging out with chefs as they explore all the best ways to cook wings, pot pies, pizzas and other savory chicken dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Desserts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking skips straight to the sweets as he dives headlong into the 15 best desserts offered in the United States. From the rich and chocolatey to the fruity and flavourful.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Me In Texas
programme.desc: Chef Roger Mooking sees that everything is bigger in Texas, first meeting Pit Master Levi Goode at Armadillo Palace in Houston. On Levi's custom rotisserie trailer, they roast a 250-pound side of beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Sizzling Steaks
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets Tom Perini at his restaurant, Perini Ranch Steakhouse in Buffalo Gap.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Good Eats: Q
programme.desc: Alton Brown thinks he's cracked the barbecue code and makes pulled pork.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Muffin Man

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Royals and the Red River City

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Lights and Literature
programme.desc: Noah tries his hand at making a deep fried root beer float and torches a berry brulee waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burgers and Bombs

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cowboys and Cakes
programme.desc: Noah joins the crowd of the Fort Worth Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas to experience the meaty Cowboy Burrito and the Texas Juicy Lucy.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Flying High! Harmony Pegasus!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Parallel Friendships!
DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout
programme.desc: After crashing Ma Beagle’s birthday party, Webby and a new mysterious friend must get back home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 2: Escape From Reality
programme.desc: Dipper, Soos, and Wendy must save Mabel from a strange new world, while Bill's forces plan their next move.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas' Birthday Clip-O-Rama!
programme.desc: It's Phineas' birthday and Ferb puts together a clip show of the gang's favourite moments. Meanwhile, Agent P must stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from using his 'non-inator' to pre-empt his brothers' biography from appearing on television.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Beak
programme.desc: A Super Villain challenges Phineas and Ferb after mistaking them for super heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Nerds of a Feather
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb attend a Comic Book Convention in Danville and they are excited to show some of their designs to one of their heroes.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: My Fair Goalie
programme.desc: When Ferb's cousins visit from England and challenge him to a soccer match, he and Phineas warp the walls of physics and build a high tech 3D stadium. Candace enlists the help of Eliza to teach her the rules of etiquette.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tales From the Resistance
programme.desc: After Doofenshmirtz is defeated, a new threat in the Second Dimension emerges, leaving it up to Phineas, Ferb, Candace and her resistance fighters to defeat this new foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 15, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 16, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland
programme.desc: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: After the wall in Imaginationland is blown up by terrorists, the evil side crosses over. Cartman tracks down Kyle and Stan at the Pentagon and demands Kyle makes good on their agreement. Meanwhile, U.S. troops cross over into Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 16, 2020

programme.desc: During a crime spree, Barbrady is forced to admit he can't read and must return to school. Anarchy ensues when the town realizes they are without law enforcement, so Barbrady makes the boys deputies to help keep the peace.
