programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: Newlyweds are murdered in a small town in Illinois and a local barfly is quickly sent to death row for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Killer Cop
programme.desc: Rookie police officer James Duckett is sentenced to death for the rape and murder of a young girl. Fourteen years later, a homicide detective gets a letter from Duckett and becomes convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Web of Lies
programme.desc: The shooting of a newspaper carrier in rural Mississippi lands 20-year-old Marlon Howell on death row. Convicted on the word of two co-defendants and the identification of an eyewitness with a checkered past, Marlon maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: It takes a long time and a very hot fire to cremate a human body, and thus destroy any evidence of foul play. But the medical examiner who performed the autopsy on the badly burned body of Charles 'Jack' Lynch found telltale clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots
programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murdered Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter is found brutally murdered in Santa Ana, California, with five young children left in the home unscathed. The parents are quick to point to a local transient who had previously burglarized the house.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Sentencing a reformed Chicago gang member to death reveals corruption at every level of the criminal justice system.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: McVeigh's Shocking Confession (Part 2)
programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Biting Back At Africa
programme.desc: In a unique four-person challenge, a lion attack survivor returns to Africa to face her fears. Surrounded by lions, crocodiles and cape buffalo, the tribe of four struggles against constant threats and each other as they try to survive in a kill zone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Island of Tears
programme.desc: Max and Bianca face off with aggressive caiman, boa constrictors, large spiders, and thorny mangroves in this Superfan challenge on a tropical island in Panama.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Andros Islands
programme.desc: In this Pop Up Edition an Army veteran and a Cajun boat captain take on relentless thunderstorms and battle dehydration on the edge of the Bermuda Triangle. Fun and interesting factoids appear on screen as they navigate more than 20 miles of ocean.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: South Africa
programme.desc: In this Pop Up Edition, two strangers are dropped in one of the most dangerous African locations in the dead heat of Summer. Fun and interesting factoids appear on screen as they're faced with aggressive hippos and charging elephants.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: The Mysterious Disappearance of The Lost Legion
programme.desc: Rob must find out what happened to Rome's 9th Legion, which vanished into thin air. He meets with military historians and archaeologists as he searches through muddy bogs, analyzes ancient skulls and learns about Roman ghosts.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: Instant attraction gives way to unforgiving conditions on a Nicaraguan island teeming with bull sharks and big cats. As the struggle to survive hits a low point; a brutal flood threatens to wipe out the camp and all chances of survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A Navy vet and a military mom tackle the harsh conditions of Mexico's uninhabitable Cayo Venado. A prowling black panther, tree sap poisonous to the touch, and a week of freezing rain lead this pair of survivalists right up to the breaking point.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: The Mysterious Disappearance of The Lost Legion
programme.desc: Rob must find out what happened to Rome's 9th Legion, which vanished into thin air. He meets with military historians and archaeologists as he searches through muddy bogs, analyzes ancient skulls and learns about Roman ghosts.

programme.title: Mad Dog Made: Knives that Save Lives
programme.desc: A new take on the legendary jaws of life for an isolated first responder, but a big fail on a major crash test brings the team back to the drawing board. The team then updates an ancient fighting sward to make a new powerful tool.

programme.title: Mad Dog Made: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: An Alaskan Bush pilot needs a shotgun that can withstand a plane crash and a bear attack. Mad Dog forges an indestructible axe to help a firefighter take on 1,000 degree blazes.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Flip Flops to Snowshoes
programme.desc: Michael and Miranda have moved from Florida to Alaska. It will be a drastic change from what they're used to, but they believe they are up for it.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Log Homes and Saloons
programme.desc: Adventurous couple, James and Erin, have been living in Anchorage for the past decade. Now that their son is older, they're looking to make the remote outpost of Talkeetna a full time home.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: ATV Required
programme.desc: Eric and Amanda are ready to buy their very first home in one of their favourite places to visit: Talkeetna, Alaska. But as newlyweds, every penny counts so they might have to go the extra mile, even if that means traveling off the road.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Growing Up Alaska
programme.desc: Kane and Laci long for an Alaskan experience. They plan to move from their city apartment to the open arctic spaces of Alaska.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Rocks to Riches
programme.desc: Cole and Amanda have everything they want and love their life in Alaska, except they are missing their dream home. Tune in as this couple searches for a multi-million dollar place to call their own.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Timber Homes
programme.desc: Newlyweds Mike and Jen have always dreamed of living in a log home, now they're headed for the hills above Fairbanks to make that dream a reality.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Frontier Comfort
programme.desc: Fairbanks natives Dave and Penny want to get out of town and find a home on the river where they can enjoy their favourite outdoor activities like snow machining, fishing and riding ATVs.

programme.title: Buying Alaska: Mountain Homes and Domes
programme.desc: Kevin and Katelynn have toured all over Alaska but they keep coming back to the hillside town of Eagle River. It's rustic mountain living that's close to the big city of Anchorage, but no home in Alaska comes without risk or quirks.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Stuck in the Muck
programme.desc: Dave and Cody head into the Everglades to take on the role of airboaters stuck in a sawgrass prairie marsh under the blazing Florida sun. They must seek shelter in a nearby swamp where water moccasin, python and alligators lay in wait.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Slash and Burn
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how lost hunters can survive in the harsh conditions of Tierra Del Fuego, just 500 miles from Antarctica. To demonstrate how to survive an extreme injury, Dave self-inflicts a laceration and uses black powder to cauterize the wound.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Eating Dust
programme.desc: From the barren salt flats to the vast desert woodland, Dave and Cody battle the elements in the sun scorched desert of Baja, Mexico. With few supplies, they each demonstrate how to make use of an unlikely resource- urine.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Armed with what's left of an avalanche victim's gear, Dave and Cody show how to survive in the harsh Rocky Mountains. Facing sub-zero temperatures, they make their way down a jagged ice waterfall, build a snow cave and try to salvage a dead elk carcass.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of the Clouds
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take only a poncho, a specimen jar, and a broken lighter with them to take on the wet cloud forests of Panama.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Bitten
programme.desc: Dave and Cody show how to survive the rugged jungle in Thailand using only the gear an ill-equipped ecotourist might carry for a day trek: a Thai jungle knife, steel wool, a sharpening stone, a damaged cell phone and a bag of tobacco.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Tyler's Trial
programme.desc: In the legendary Palmer goldfields, Parker and his team encounter a lucrative family-run mining operation and discover dirt far richer than anything they've ever seen in the Yukon. But convincing the family to lease him virgin ground will come at a price.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's a Horror Story
programme.desc: When Frank asked his girlfriend to move in, he wasn't expecting her to fill his house with clutter.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: John and Lonnie's Story
programme.desc: John and Lonnie are two brothers from opposite ends of the spectrum. For years estranged, the brothers are now brought together by a common need to lose weight while they still can.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Tommy's Story

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Legacy in Danger
programme.desc: Heimo and his youngest daughter Krin hunt for caribou. The Seldens have helpful visitors and an exciting announcement. Bob arrives back at his cabin.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Bear Intruder
programme.desc: As the seasons turn, the Last Alaskans are gearing up for trapping season. Heimo's newest cabin may have already fallen victim to a marauding bear. Tyler and Ashley are in full swing building a new home for their growing family.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Joining Forces
programme.desc: As winter approaches, Charlie soon discovers why the area is called 'Starvation Country.' Heimo and Edna join forces to hunt, while the Seldens haul home Tyler's recent moose kill.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Blood on Their Hands
programme.desc: After a poor trapping season, Charlie Wright teams up with Stan Zuray in a last-ditch effort to catch beaver. Stan and Joe Zuray discover a large predator has been stealing from their trapline. James Roberts teaches his two sons the importance of hunting.

programme.title: Yukon Men: All In
programme.desc: Unseasonably thin ice prevents villagers from reaching valuable hunting grounds, forcing Stan and Charlie to carve a new path through the rugged Alaskan wilderness in search of food. Desperate to provide for his family, James takes a huge risk.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Arctic Refuge: Fair Game

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Ice Breakers
programme.desc: Summer in the Yukon is signaled by the distinct sound of the cracking ice which serves as an alarm for the men and women that inhabit it who will have to get to work quickly while the weather allows it.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Cold Murder
programme.desc: A new road is proposed as a way to link Tanana to the outside world and some residents are not happy about it. Violence breaks out leaving two people dead.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: With winter fast approaching, the Last Alaskans set out to hunt moose. Heimo and Edna team up together. Tyler draws on gut instinct to stalk an elusive bull. And Charlie soon discovers why the area is called 'Starvation Country.'

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Spirit of the Hunter
programme.desc: With winter just weeks away, The Last Alaskans are desperate to fill their smokehouses. The Selden's all pitch in to haul home Tyler's recent moose kill. Heimo and Charlie both worry they might not have meat for the winter months ahead.

programme.title: Tanked!: Mel's Drive In Tank
programme.desc: California restaurant Mel's Drive In wants a tank for their new location in Santa Monica. The owners want a nostalgic feel and a ton of insert pieces that represent Mel's storied history, while pointing to the restaurant's future.

programme.title: Tanked!: Healing Garden Waterfall
programme.desc: Lifestyle brand Salt Life needs Wayde and Brett's help again. This time they want an aquarium even BIGGER and BETTER than the original. Closer to home, the guys get asked to build a custom acrylic waterfall as part of a memorial in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tanked!: Brett's Donut Mania Tank
programme.desc: Donut Mania is Brett's newest business venture and they are about to have their grand opening. Wayde and the whole team want to congratulate him with a surprise fish tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Real Aquariums of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Erika Girardi from the hit TV show, The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills needs a tank. Also known as Erika Jayne, this Diva knows exactly what she wants and that's an octopus!

programme.title: Tanked!: The Wonderful Dr. Oz Tank
programme.desc: Health expert Dr. Oz wants to add to his family. He already has chickens, bees, a cat, and a dog and wants to add some fresh water fish. This aquarium will include an Oz themed interior that will have the fish swimming down the yellow brick road.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Hoff Gets Tanked
programme.desc: As an avid diver, David Hasselhoff would love a shark tank in his home, but after an inspirational visit to the Aquarium of the Pacific, ATM get some bad news.

programme.title: Tanked!: Howie Mandel is the Brains Behind ATM
programme.desc: Howie Mandel contacts ATM to build a tank for his production office. The comedian and television host has difficulty making up his mind so Wayde and Brett must design a tank without any guidance.

programme.title: Tanked!: Howie Mandel's Surprise Tank
programme.desc: Howie Mandel has reached out to ATM for another tank. Only this time it's a surprise for his manager's company. 3 Arts Entertainment already has an existing tank but it needs a serious upgrade.

programme.title: Tanked!: Channeling the Long Island Medium
programme.desc: World famous Long Island Medium's Theresa Caputo has asked Wayde and Brett to build her not one but two aquariums in a single week! The first is a mermaid tank in the heart of their living room and the other a koi pond in her backyard.

programme.title: Tanked!: Saved by the Spell
programme.desc: The guys work with Mario Lopez to transform a coin operated 90's video game into an interactive aquarium. Back in Vegas, an illusionist asks the team to build a tank for his latest show.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tracy and his Octopus
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan was so impressed with his ATM shark tank that he's decided to come back and get a new tank for his octopus.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: Origin Story
programme.desc: Controversial music mogul Suge Knight forms Death Row Records using business tactics. His intimidation becomes legendary. He partners with Dr. Dre to change Hip Hop forever.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: The Rise of Death Row
programme.desc: Dr. Dre discovers Snoop Dogg. Suge's Death Row team releases The Chronic and Doggystyle which are huge hits. Money pours in and everyone's lives change. Snoop faces murder charges.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: Enter Tupac
programme.desc: We follow Tupac's transformation from street poet to activist then hard core gangsta rapper at Death Row. Tupac's legal trouble mount and he faces prison time. Suge declares war and East/ West beef escalates.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: East vs. West
programme.desc: Suge gets Tupac out of prison and All Eyez on Me is a massive hit. Despite success, Death Row faces huge setbacks when street violence at the label leads to Dre's departure before Tupac is shot in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: The Reckoning
programme.desc: Tupac dies and a gang war erupts in Compton. The once untouchable label crumbles as Suge's probation violation lands him in prison. Biggie is murdered in Los Angeles. The hip-hop community mourns and calls for peace.

programme.title: Death Row Chronicles: Under Investigation
programme.desc: Retired LAPD Detective Greg Kading takes us through his investigation of Tupac's and Biggie's murders. The last remaining eye witness to Tupac's assassination comes forward. The legacy of Death Row.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 1

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 2

programme.desc: Kim writes a gossip column for the school paper; Prof. Oglevee's pompous brother visits.

programme.title: The Parkers: Amazing Grace
programme.desc: The pressure of preparing for a gospel music festival has Nikki feeling a little stressed.

programme.title: Black-ish: Jack of All Trades

programme.title: Black-ish: Auntsgiving
programme.desc: Pops' older sister, Almaviligerais, unexpectedly arrives for Thanksgiving, much to everyone's delight except Ruby, who can't stand her ex-sister-in-law.

programme.title: Black-ish: Being Bow-racial
programme.desc: Bow must address unresolved feelings about her own biracial identity when Junior brings home his first girlfriend, who happens to be white.

programme.title: Black-ish: Nothing But Nepotism
programme.desc: Bow urges Dre to use his connections and secure Zoey a fellowship, but he doesn't want his daughter relying on nepotism. When Bow finds Zoey a place at the hospital, Dre balks at the idea and successfully pulls some strings at Teen Vogue.

programme.title: Black-ish: Just Christmas, Baby
programme.desc: Zoey is college-bound, so Dre sets out to create the best family Christmas ever, even having Johan and his best friend Gigi over for the celebration. Meanwhile, Bow babysits Gigi's newborn and remembers just how difficult mothering a baby is.

programme.title: Black-ish: Their Eyes Were Watching Screens
programme.desc: When Diane stumbles onto some websites that give her more than she bargained for, Dre and Bow must take action. Concerned that the internet is corrupting their children, Dre and Bow decide to make their home an internet free-zone.

programme.title: Black-ish: Lemons
programme.desc: The nation is still reeling after the outcome of the presidential election, and tensions are particularly high at Dre's work. Much to his frustration, they haven't been able to get anything done since election night eight weeks ago.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good Dre Hunting
programme.desc: Bow convinces a begrudging Dre to try therapy, and he learns how to cope with his anger issues. Meanwhile, Johan becomes a life coach to the kids.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Name Game
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have a gender reveal party, and Dre is thrilled because it's his turn to name the baby. He decides on a culturally significant name that Bow and Ruby aren't a fan of.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Demonic Hauntings

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: The Montauk Monster and More

programme.title: Kemper on Kemper: Inside The Mind of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Deadly Summer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores. Police release surveillance footage to the press and ask the public for help to find a duffle bag wielding murderer before he strikes again.

programme.desc: A shocking double murder and kidnapping springs police into action to stop a pair of deadly lovers before they can kill again. A surviving victim recounts the harrowing ordeal.

programme.title: Brazil: Jewels of the Jungle

programme.title: Brazil: Feast of the Giant Anteater
programme.desc: The grassland that covers the central region of Brazil is one of that country’s least-known habitats, and is home to some of the most extraordinary animals on earth.

programme.title: Brazil: The Jaguar's Lair

programme.title: Italy's Wild Alps
programme.desc: Untamed wilderness around distinctive rocks touched by the golden glimmer of sunset: this gorgeous view could only be of the Dolomites.

programme.title: Wild Central America: Wild Portugal

programme.title: Wild Scotland: Spring Awakening

programme.title: Wild Scotland: Mid Summer's Night Dream
programme.desc: By midsummer, the sun rules here for nearly 18 hours a day. Otters, guillemots, golden eagles and pine martens race to raise their families before the end of the Highland’s brief summer.

programme.title: Wild Scotland: Into the Woods
programme.desc: Only the toughest will survive the Highlands’ darkest and most overwhelming season. Grey seal pups, migrating Atlantic salmon, reindeer and red squirrels are pushed to the limit.

programme.title: Borneo's Secret Kingdom: Forest of the Flying Snakes

programme.title: The Nile: Paradise Found

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Stargate in the Jungle
programme.desc: Something strange is caught on camera in a tunnel beneath the Colombian jungle, leading experts to wonder if it's a wormhole to far-off places in the cosmos. Using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if there's an interdimensional conspiracy at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: To Catch an Alien
Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: NASA's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: We countdown the greatest moments in NASA's nearly sixty year history, revealing the incredible stories behind the missions and discoveries that have remade our understanding of the final frontier.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: The Sun's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: The latest discoveries reveal the mysterious and ever-changing nature of our Sun. Astronomers are only now beginning to understand the vast power of our giant star, and new ground-breaking investigations show it like never before.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Expedition Extraterrestrial
programme.desc: Scientists on the hunt for extraterrestrial life suspect that it might be closer than we think: our very own solar system. Using the latest discoveries, experts might at last confirm that our neighbors might harbor alien life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: New Race to the Moon
programme.desc: New discoveries show that the Moon could be our next home for human life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Voyager Mission
programme.desc: Voyager has had a profound effect on our knowledge of the cosmos. Its mission was supposed to last five years but remains ongoing, changing our understanding of the solar system. With contributions from key scientists, we explore what happens next.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Juno Mission
programme.desc: NASA's Juno mission is the closest we've ever explored Jupiter, and its incredible images reveal the gas giant's deepest secrets and how this deadly world helped create our solar system.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of Jupiter
programme.desc: Recent discoveries by NASA's Juno mission reveal new secrets about Jupiter, a strange world that is more like a star than a planet. As scientists uncover what lies beneath its violent storms, our understanding of the solar system could change forever.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Search for Alien Earths
programme.desc: Astronomers and researchers are on the hunt for the groundbreaking discovery that confirms extraterrestrial life. Using state-of-the-art technology like the Kepler telescope, scientists examine thousands of exoplanets in search of another Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.desc: Detectives try to track down a gang of thieves that are preying on empty camps in the deep bayou.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Poached

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Hunt for the Swamp Monster

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Karen Kuzma adored her older brother, until she began seeing changes in him beyond her comprehension. Little did she know, he was becoming one of the most infamous serial killers in American history.

programme.title: If I Should Die: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: Conrad and Ricky Morales are happily living with their uncle and his wife in Washington State. But when Conrad goes missing, and Ricky later dies under suspicious circumstances, it falls to Conrad's diary to explain the shocking truth about the family.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Watch Your Children
programme.desc: In the summer of 2002, five-year-old Samantha Runnion is playing with a friend in front of their homes in Stanton, California. Suddenly, a man appears and snatches Samantha, dragging her into his car. The race is on to find her - and the man responsible.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: If I Should Die: The Lost Boys

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Black Widow
programme.desc: Gary Taylor knows what people say about Catherine Mehaffey. Still, when he finally meets the sexy lawyer, he just can't stay away. But it's only a matter of time before Gary realizes he's made a grave mistake and breaking things off won't come easy.

programme.title: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Karen Kuzma adored her older brother, until she began seeing changes in him beyond her comprehension. Little did she know, he was becoming one of the most infamous serial killers in American history.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Left Alone
programme.desc: In 1986, 13 year-old Mollie Pittman is attacked and murdered in the Orlando home of family friends. With no sign of a break-in, investigators wonder, did Mollie know her killer? Seventeen years of dogged investigation reveal the terrifying truth.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Nightmare Field
programme.desc: In 2011, Dalene Carlson goes missing, just weeks after relocating to Stockton, California. As investigators search for the missing 23 year-old, a shocking discovery in a nearby cornfield sets them on the trail of a vicious killer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mid Life Murder
programme.desc: These Deadly Women didn't grow old gracefully; they committed 'Mid-Life Murder.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Dark Secrets
programme.desc: Dark Secrets are the stock-in-trade of Deadly Women.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Illicit and Lethal
programme.desc: Their affairs are hot... but their tempers are hotter.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Self-Made Widows
programme.desc: When these women fell out of love they didn't walk away; they chose a permanent separation with financial benefits. They all wanted to be single but with no strings attached; they were 'Self Made Widows'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Heartless Souls
programme.desc: Sometimes evil seems to lurk from the beginning, and there's no stopping it. For these deadly women, cruelty comes from deep within.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Baby-Faced Killers
programme.desc: These baby-faced girls may look childish and innocent, but behind their little girl smiles lays a darkness most adults never experience.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Total Control
programme.desc: Some women must always get their way. A seductress has men and women under her spell, a churchgoer finds a new form of faith, and a matriarch rules with an iron rod.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer-In-Laws
programme.desc: These Deadly Women satisfied their blood lust within the family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Green-eyed Monsters
programme.desc: For these heartless women envy is the deadliest sin. An obsessed mistress sacrifices her lover's wife; a young lover kills her girlfriend to keep her from the arms of another; and an angry cowgirl destroys her ex's life by destroying his family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: When these women were betrayed, they demanded payback. A crazed mother took a custody battle too far, a scorned lover wiped out her competition, and a sex addict stepped on everyone in her way.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Dream Pool for a Dream Home

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lap of Luxury

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Overload
programme.desc: Mike and Kathleen move to interior work, but the remote location is still slow with progress. At Paige and Cody's site, mechanical failures prevent the project from finishing before dog sled season. As Mike and Teresa build higher, it gets more dangerous.

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands
programme.desc: Paige and Cody's build takes a hit after Sterling and Joe leave the site and a trailer full of vital materials breaks down. The foundation is sinking at Mike and Teresa's cabin while Kathleen and Mike Kondus watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Gonna Be Plush
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as Paige and Cody wrap up before dog racing season in Cantwell while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the White Mountains. Meanwhile, the Oldenkamps struggle with the challenges of working on a grain-bin-style cabin.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Dollar House
programme.desc: In Minneapolis, Minnesota, Nicole Curtis buys a condemned, boarded-up house for just one dollar. She has the support of the neighbors behind her as she plans to transform it into a beautifully restored showpiece for the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Nicole's Grandparents' House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis takes on her most personal project ever: a 1950s ranch-style home her grandparents built by hand. She restores the kitchen to its original layout and transforms the dingy work basement into a party-ready rec room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Campbell Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis returns to her hometown of Detroit to save a 1920s home that suffered severe damage from a fire next door.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Squatters and Scorpions
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey buy a Palm Springs property sight unseen, but once they get inside they see that it's been trashed by squatters and inhabited by scorpions. The only way to make a profit is to gut the home, adding extra dollars to their budget.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: This Mold House
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey buy a house that's stuck in the past, but they have high hopes of bringing it into the future. Renovating outdated architecture is part of the job, but it's the unexpected disasters that make or break a flip.

programme.desc: Noah dives into some of the cheesiest dishes featured on Carnival Eats.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Yummy in the Middle
programme.desc: It's that ooey-gooey goodness in the middle that we just can't get enough of, so we're heading straight to the middle of things to see what greatness awaits. Jeff Mauro indulges in a 100-layer vanilla creme doughnut that's full of surprises.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Borrowed Favourites
programme.desc: Sharing is caring, and the treats that family and friends love become personal favourites too! Robert Irvine takes his wife's advice and discovers the world's greatest omelet at Babystacks Cafe in Las Vegas, Nev.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Picture Perfect
programme.desc: We're going after picture-perfect dishes that taste as good as they look.

programme.desc: We're talking about throwback dishes that are better now than ever before.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Pies
programme.desc: Visit innovative bakers who decide to turn the pie world upside down.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Colorado Sweets
programme.desc: Colorado has some amazing sweets. Head to High Point Creamery in Denver from some unusual ice cream flavors like lemon ice pop with raspberry swirl and earl grey tea with shortbread.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Cute and Sweet
programme.desc: Today we visit three locations that pack big flavors in small servings. First stop is Cake Monkey Bakery in Los Angeles to try some of their mini layer cakes.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Classic desserts get deliciously updated at three sweet shops across the country. Skull and Cakebones rocks vegan cupcakes in Austin, Texas, with flavors like basil berry, dirty chai and just beet it.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Savory Sweets
programme.desc: Sweet and savory flavors are such an irresistible combination. We visit three sweet and savory hot spots including Aiko Pops in Denver, where ice pops come in radical flavors like raspberry and sweet corn.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Mornings in Sunny L.A.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cake Makes The World Go Round

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cake Pride
programme.desc: Fondant details make Suzanne's cake a true work of art, and Nastassja puts her own spin on a childhood friend's christening cake. Eloise creates a colorful cake with a surprise filling for a Pride festival, and Molly makes a little boy's birthday roar.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Prince Of Cakes
programme.desc: Prince Charles gives his royal approval to Phil and Christine's cakes. While Eloise challenges herself with a cake of gigantic proportions, Molly shows Manchester United pride in her latest cake creation.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Groovy And Bubbly Cakes
programme.desc: Molly gets wound up in her sheep cake for a new yarn shop, and Phil and Christine spin out a groovy, life-size record player cake. Eloise perfects a giant prosecco bottle for a celebration, and Karisha juggles bridesmaid duties and cake baking.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Magical Character Cakes
programme.desc: Cake artists sculpt the tallest state fair icon out of chocolate for a Texas cake that proves bigger is better. Fairies come to life in an epic, Fantasyland-themed birthday cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Dazzling Dragon and Bear Cakes

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Over-the-Top Birthday Cakes

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Italian Food and Instrument Cakes

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Wreck It Zek
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Major Blast
programme.desc: Fred is targeted when a new villain, Major Blast appears in the city.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fear Not
programme.desc: Supersonic Stu busts his grandmother, Supersonic Sue, out of prison.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Flash of Light! Shining Crux!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Alola, Alola!
programme.desc: At the start of their break, the students have visitors, and Ash can’t believe his eyes.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 3: Take Back the Falls
programme.desc: Ford discovers Bill's true motives and then a final confrontation with Bill leads to the Pines family's ultimate fate and greatest sacrifice.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.desc: Daniel investigates the realest reporter in the news game and demonstrates why being married is the number one cause of back pain.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Woah Vicky
programme.desc: Daniel meets a strong African-American woman named Woah Vicky, attends a born-again baptism and offers the heartfelt apology you've been waiting for.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Burping Girl
programme.desc: Daniel encounters Burpzilla and forces the Tosh.0 staff to start getting in shape in a way that's both impractical and reckless.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Noble Ape
programme.desc: Jim Gaffigan takes you on a tour of everything that crosses his mind, including fruit-shaped tumors, the brilliance of Japanese toilets and, of course, food, lots of food.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Tracy Morgan, Kevin Nealon & Adam Carolla
programme.desc: Kevin Nealon places an emphatic flower order, Spoonie Luv tries to take a very early family photo, and Bobby seeks acupuncture for his chronic belching.

programme.title: South Park: Pinewood Derby
programme.desc: Randy has a plan that will assure Stan a first place trophy in this year's Pinewood Derby. When they accidentally break warp speed, the town is visited and held hostage by an alien gangster.

programme.title: South Park: With Apologies to Jesse Jackson
programme.desc: Randy Marsh tries to find forgiveness after mistakenly using a racial slur on 'Wheel of Fortune.' Meanwhile, Cartman gets into a rumble with an assembly guest.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O

programme.title: South Park: Bass to Mouth
programme.desc: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Fatbeard
programme.desc: Cartman's dream of living the life of a pirate will come true if he can just get to Somalia. When he doesn't find a crew of swashbucklers, he assumes command and leads the Somalian pirates to a glory of riches.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Sucks
programme.desc: Cartman invites Butters over for the night and plans to do disgusting things to him in his sleep. However, when he photographs Butters' penis in his mouth, there are drastic consequences for both boys.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: The boys of South Park produce their own morning news show on the school's closed-circuit television station and are immediately caught up in an intense competition for ratings.

programme.title: South Park: The F Word
programme.desc: The boys fight back against the loud and obnoxious motorcycle riders that are disrupting everyone's peace in South Park.

programme.title: The Office: Business School

programme.title: Movie: Black Hearted Killer

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own
programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: The Explosion (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1995, Timothy McVeigh, a 26-year-old U.S. army veteran, detonated a truck bomb outside a federal building in Oklahoma City. We take a look back at the events that led up to the largest domestic terrorist attack in the history of the United States.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Bombing of Oklahoma City: McVeigh's Shocking Confession (Part 2)
programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shell Games/ Senior Discount
programme.desc: When Old Man Jenkins disrupts business at the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs cant find a way to kick him out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Grill Is Gone/ the Night Patty
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back. SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squirrel Jelly/The String
programme.desc: SpongeBob pulls a string that never seems to end from Squidward's shit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Swamp Mates/ One Trick Sponge
programme.desc: Bubble Bass gets stranded with Patrick in a swamp looking for a lost action figure.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: My Leg!/ Ink Lemonade
programme.desc: Now that Fred's leg has healed up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way no matter what. Patrick's lemonade stand isn't doing too well until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanitation Insanity/ Bunny Hunt
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. A sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubbletown/Girls’ Night Out

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob in RandomLand/ SpongeBob's Bad Habit

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Appointment TV/ Karen's Virus
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: Weather Underground
programme.desc: A breakdown of the science behind today's weather with fan interaction and frequent visits from guest meteorologists.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Highway Heroes & Desert Disaster
programme.desc: On a frozen highway, a heroic State Troopers battle to save drivers and each other from imminent disaster. Plus an afternoon drive goes horribly wrong, leaving one man lost, alone and miles from nowhere in the sweltering heat of the Arizona desert.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Fire then Flood & Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: In a year of extreme weather, raging fires, deadly mudslides, and horrific hurricanes force communities to rally together to save themselves from disaster.

programme.title: Defying Death: Heroes & Survivors: Swept Away
programme.desc: Deadly surge traps storm chasers during a monster hurricane. Hillside homes are ripped apart by a mudslide. Kayakers face death on raging rapids.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Plan of Attack
programme.desc: The Ross crew deals with a wreck filled with loose car engines; a truck's cab shears off, shutting down the road to the border; John Allen goes down a steep ravine for a recovery.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Ladies and Gents, We Are Going to War
programme.desc: A blizzard gives Herb's crew of night of non-stop recoveries; a heavy rescue veteran fights the toughest battle of his career in a multi-semi pileup.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Whole Lot of Faith
programme.desc: Toronto is gridlocked by a massive wreck scene; Sonny becomes a mentor when a high-pressure job goes wrong; Onne and crew work to save a trailer that's going to tear apart.

programme.title: Top Ten Worst Flash Floods
programme.desc: Flash floods have the power to turn lives into nightmares. Raging walls of water barreling down rivers can sweep you off your feet, lift cars from asphalt, and wash homes from their foundations. We are counting down the top ten worst flash floods.

programme.title: Top Ten Most Extreme Places
programme.desc: Jim Cantore counts down the top ten most extreme places in the U.S. Places that endure epic conditions, the hottest, coldest, driest, stormiest spots and everything in between.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Phobias
programme.desc: Weather can be shocking and terrifying, but if a healthy respect of Mother Nature turns into an irrational fear, you may have a weather phobia. You aren't alone, as one in ten people have weather phobias, and we count down the top ten in this special.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Inventions
programme.desc: For centuries, man has worked to create devices that protect and prepare us for any type of weather. From the extreme to the practical, these are the inventions that help us co-exist with Mother Nature and the weather she unleashes.

programme.title: Weekend Recharge

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: I've Seen My Share

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Racing a Wildfire

programme.title: World's Wildest Weather: Hurricane Highway
