programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Grow House
programme.desc: Scott and his team makeover neglected homes, creating happy new homeowners and neighbours.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Doomsday House
programme.desc: Scott agrees to team up with the twins to flip a house that is filled with apocalypse prepping gear, which becomes a nightmare.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Class Action House
programme.desc: Scott goes all-in on a house bursting with mould.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Breaking Banchory
programme.desc: Ashlee convinces the guys to let her do more than just sell, she wants to design it. Duke has reservations, but agrees to let her take on a zombie that has all the potential of becoming a mid-century masterpiece.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Blood, Sweetbriar, and Tears
programme.desc: Keith talks his partners into going in with him on a zombie house flip in prime district. He assures them he can flip it fast they can target families with kids prior to the new school year.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Terror Town
programme.desc: Along with its brutal past comes a long history of dark paranormal experiences in the town of Clifton, Arizona, which has many residents convinced that it may be cursed.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Terror Town
programme.desc: The team revisits several hubs of paranormal activity as they try to get to the bottom of the aggressive phenomena.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: Hot Ones: John Mayer
programme.desc: John Mayer takes on the wings of death and everything else along the way, including Justin Bieber's melody wizardry and the best guitar faces in history.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Kumail Nanjiani
programme.desc: Kumail Nanjiani discusses tech bros, breaks down his favourite video games, and explains his obsession with 'The X-Files.' Not only that, but he becomes the first guest in the show's history to dine with a knife and fork.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Lucy Wants a Friend
programme.desc: A crew at a firehouse do everything they can to alleviate their boredom.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: Lucy Wants a Friend
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Movie: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry Roth, a veterinarian who's afraid of commitment, falls in love with Lucy who suffers from short-term memory loss. In an attempt to win her over, Henry sets out to remind Lucy why she fell for him the first time by romancing her each new day.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Michelle Buteau Headlines
programme.desc: Michelle Buteau headlines, while Alex Scott expresses gratitude to the unsung heroes of the work place while Terrence DeLane shares his love for women with experience in the bedroom.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Yamaneika
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Gina Yashere Headlines
programme.desc: Gina Yashere headlines as Neko White has a run-in with the new Sherriff in town. Plus, Alex Scott teaches how to take cover and Tacarra Williams gets a fight in her son's bedroom.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Janelle James Headlines
programme.desc: The always funny Janelle James headlines tonight. Plus, Blaq Ron gives a brief history lesson on line dancing, Kerry Coddett contemplates alternate styles of dating and Reggie Conquest has a PSA for kids.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: America's Next Top Bottom
programme.desc: Noah Gardenswartz reveals why Santa never visits anyone on the panel, Liza Treyger counsels a guy with a stalking ex and Yassir Lester spots a hip-hop superstar in the crowd.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: What Is Woke?
programme.desc: Thomas Dale puts a spell on Damien, Ali Kolbert knows what Thomas does to relax, and Matthew Broussard reveals Ali's favorite board game.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: America's Least Wanted
programme.desc: Michelle Buteau knows exactly what millennials say, Cipha Sounds has a surprising favorite dance move, and Shane Torres explains what makes Cipha different from other DJs.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Fun Mob Meeting
programme.desc: Pete Lee knows what not to do in the mafia, Sarah Tiana responds harshly to Pete's parenting proposal, and Sean Patton reveals a scary 80s trend that's making a comeback.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No Sugar, Tons of Spice
programme.desc: Two teams duke it out against the catastrophic concoctions from Chef Willie.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Worst. Hot Sauce. Ever
programme.desc: Two comic book guys go against two twerkin' besties. The 'Constrictor Sauce' knocks the comic book guys to their knees, but the keep fighting for the prize.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Jonas Brothers
programme.desc: The Jonas Brothers battle against the wings of death while discussing topics such as Met Gala hangouts with OBJ and Taylor Swift's anti-paparazzi techniques.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Ken Jeong
programme.desc: Ken Jeong battles against Sean Evans and the wings of death, all while dispelling common medical myths and discussing his encounters with NB legends like Shaq and Kevin Durant.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Chrissy Teigen
programme.desc: Chrissy Teigen licks her way through the wings of death while discussing memorable Twitter wars, the Medieval Times and a no-fail recipe for Thai ribs.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Jeff Goldblum
programme.desc: Jeff Goldblum faces the wings of death while breaking down Jurassic Park lore and discussing his spiritual encounter with Quavo.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Movie: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Cousins Bo and Luke Duke enlist the help of their cousin Daisy and Uncle Jesse to keep the Duke farm from being destroyed by the town's evil commissioner; the boys' orange 1969 Dodge Charger helps keep them one step ahead of the sheriff.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: Find out which Joker brought a kitten to the set, and who's responsible for the song used on the show. Plus, learn which instrument Q tried to master before the show.

programme.desc: Mike needs Harvey and Rachel's help to overcome an impossible obstacle or his dream becoming a real lawyer is over. Meanwhile, Donna's new venture hits a snag and Louis tries to patch things up with Tara.

programme.desc: Viola Field's fall from grace as a successful television journalist has left her looking for control in her life. When her son announces his engagement to a working-class woman, Viola sets out to ruin her son's marriage before it gets started.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pub Grub and More
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for the real deal in bar foods and some Salvadorian classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handcrafted
programme.desc: Guy checks in on tasty joints run by food fanatics, including a farm-to-table spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Haunts
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's takin' a spin through the town favourites. In Chatham, N.J., the real deal Italian joint bakin' up some righteous fried chicken, arancini balls and the decadent sacred swine sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Authentic Eats
programme.desc: Guy finds real deal authentic eats in St. Louis and Syracuse.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Things New York
programme.desc: Guy's gets a taste of New York in and out of the Big Apple, including Eureka, California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pork and Peru
programme.desc: On this trip Guy digs into killer grub like Michigan-made pizza pie and Philly sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cultural Twist
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into cultural cuisine with a twist! First, there's a cafe that's been serving scratch-made Scandinavian specialties in Salt Lake City since the 1950s. Next, there's a pizza joint putting an Indian spin on the classic Italian pie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked and Barbecued
programme.desc: Things are cookin' all kinds of ways in Flavortown. First, Guy Fieri checks in on a diner in San Diego where law enforcement hones their skills and stuffs their gills.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pretzels, Pork and Paella
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into everything from pretzels to paella. In Bozeman, Mont., a five-star take on breakfast with a Mexican pork masterpiece and a French toast Monte Cristo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecue, Batter and Beer Can Chicken
programme.desc: Maui, Hawaii has ridiculous ramen and beer can chicken. Los Angeles has a food truck with a twist on fish and chips. Plus, a barbecue spot with fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bird and Beef
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, an amped up deli serves up lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Brisket and Belly
programme.desc: Guy is in Los Angeles at a late-night spot with a twist, Columbus for a joint serving creative combos like brisket on corn flakes and Phoenix at a barbeque stop with smoked prime rib and pork belly dumplings.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meat Fix Four Ways
programme.desc: Michael begins his meat-seeking journey in Lockhart, Texas, where one family remains at the forefront of America's greatest barbecue after four generations. Next, he swings over to a British-style joint in Brooklyn where they use lobster meat.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: The Cusimano Special ('Da Cuz, for Short)
programme.desc: Rachael Ray makes her husband John's favourite sandwich, the Cusimano special: a beef au jus with an Italian twist, adding provolone sauce, roasted peppers and pickled peppers. It's so beloved that they call it 'da cuz for short.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: It's a Honey-Do Day
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli's husband, Tom, completes a long list of chores and is rewarded with his favorite dishes, starting with his favorite Eggs Benedict, made Valerie's way! Then, she preps a Prosciutto Bruschetta.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Spring Pantry
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson turns microwavable rice into chicken fried rice casserole. Katie Lee makes an easy berry crisp dump cake, and author Hilaria Baldwin stops by to make a delicious grain bowl.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: High School Reunion
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister Beth invite their high school BFF over to reminisce about old memories over a delicious meal. They share a few laughs together before enjoying a menu made of classics from their high school days.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Campfire Cookout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting together some delicious campfire favourites and reliving her childhood by camping out in her backyard. Her husband Nick is building the fire, and they've invited some old camp buddies to join the fun.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Ree Drummond packs a kitchen-equipment care package for her daughter, Alex, working in Dallas. There's a delicious quarter sheet pan supper that's quick to make after a day in the office.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: No Cooking Required
programme.desc: Ree Drummond features some fuss-free recipes that require no cooking. Dishes include her Ranch Muffuletta Sandwich with Spicy Olive Spread and a Chinese Chicken Salad that features rotisserie chicken and ginger.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Colorful Spring Celebration
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts celebrate the spring season with a most-colorful feast. Sunny Anderson shares her easy baked lemon sole with spring onions, a beautiful main course.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Italian Favorites
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood celebrates her love of an Italian meal by cooking up a menu filled with an abundance of flavour and memories. She invites her neighbour, Kathy, to help, and Trisha learns how to make fresh pasta from scratch!

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: A Southern Heart-to-Heart with Kelsea Ballerini
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites Kelsea Ballerini over to share stories from their journeys in country music. Kelsea represents the new wave of female country artists who, like Trisha and the trailblazing musicians before her, are empowering young women today.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A-Z: A for Awesome Asian
programme.desc: Guy gets a big taste of the Far East in Las Vegas. He chows down on Japanese and Korean.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A-Z: B for Breakfast Out of Bounds
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches out some of America's greatest breakfasts. Visit a restaurant that makes 30 different kinds of pancakes and another spot with 60 different omelettes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A-Z: C for Cookin' Up Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of comfort cooking. In Phoenix, a funky joint stacking up barbecue fries and a new spin on chilaquiles. Plus, visit a Dallas spot cranking out all kinds of off-the-chain chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A-Z: D for Dynamite Dough
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is digging into dishes featuring some dynamite dough. In Mesa, Arizona, a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialties, including a meaty bun, and in Tucson, Arizona, a place cooking up a big-time saucy sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A-Z: E for Extreme Eats
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is diving into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vermont, a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Virginia, a down-home spot loading up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A-Z: F for Fried in Flavortown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches out some great joints where they're frying up a storm including a classic half-century old diner in Philadelphia, where a French trained chef is frying international specialties. Plus, a cafe features classic French dishes, deep fried.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A-Z: G for Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's sampling foods straight off the grill. In Los Angeles, the burger joint spicing things up with a hot pork sandwich and going Mediterranean with a lamb burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A-Z: H for Hangin' Hawaii-Style
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out the hot spots in Hawaii. A third-generation, family-run joint doing plate-lunch Hawaiian style. A restaurant by the water, where the daily special really is the catch of the day.

programme.title: Tanked!: Channeling the Long Island Medium
programme.desc: World famous Long Island Medium's Theresa Caputo has asked Wayde and Brett to build her not one but two aquariums in a single week! The first is a mermaid tank in the heart of their living room and the other a koi pond in her backyard.

programme.title: Tanked!: 100 Episodes STRONG!
programme.desc: ATM is excited to design a tank for WWE Superstar and tag team champion Titus O'Neil! The guys will need work as a tag team of their town in order to deliver on their promise to build a University of Florida themed Gator tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Johnny Damon Is Expecting the Unexpected
programme.desc: ATM is building two tanks for two-time World Series champion Johnny Damon. Things get even more exciting when Damon and his wife asked the guys to finish the tanks in time to help reveal the gender of their newest baby at a party for friends and family.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Tanks for the Heroes
programme.desc: ATM is tasked with transforming a photo booth into an aquarium for Las Vegas' monthly First Friday event. Then, the boys head to Santa Rosa to build a tank that pays homage to the heroes of the recent California wildfires.

programme.title: Tanked!: Ty Dolla's Fresh Tank
programme.desc: Hip-hop artist Ty Dolla $ign wants a tank in his house in Long Beach. He calls in Wayde and Brett to construct a huge freshwater tank. Complete with a real rock insert, perfect replicas of Ty's awards, and embedded into a wall.

programme.title: Tanked!: Nacho Average Fish Tanks
programme.desc: Snap On Tools is hosting their annual convention and needs ATM's help to wow their attendees. They send one of their giant tool storage chests to Vegas to get the signature tank treatment.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Gillfriends of Comedy
programme.desc: The comedic ladies of television Betty White and Sherri Sheppard hire the ATM crew to create a couple of glamorous custom tanks.

programme.title: Tanked!: Marshawn Lynch Goes Beastmode
programme.desc: Renowned NFL running back and Super Bowl Champion Marshawn Lynch enlists Brett and Wayde to build him the ultimate Beastmode tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tank You Come Again!
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett pay a visit to some old clients. Jeff Tremaine struggles with feeding his eels. A fire at Malibu Winery has damaged their outdoor tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Smiling Is the Best Medicine
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett join Las Vegas' First Friday street fair when they develop a photo booth into an aquarium for the 24 hour event. Across the nation at Nationwide Children's Hospital the guys create an underwater wonderland.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wildfire Heroes Tank
programme.desc: Coddingtown Center in Santa Rosa have tasked the guys with a very special tank. To kick off their new remodel, they want Wayde and Brett to make a tank that pays respects to the heroes that helped the area during the recent wildfires.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees

programme.desc: GG undergoes emergency surgery and the crew rallies around her. Tommy and MJ meet with a lawyer to discuss Reza's charges against them. Reza unleashes his anger on Nema for meddling in his personal affairs.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Behind the Episode 810
programme.desc: Persian-American living a life of luxury try balancing social life, career and family.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Le’ing with the Devil
programme.desc: Mike surprises Paulina with a birthday trip to Hawaii, and invites the whole crew along. Paulina plans a night out with the girls before the trip, while Nema and Mike prepare by getting Botox. Tensions boil over among the Shahs at an unforgettable Lu'au.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live
programme.desc: Mercedes Javid and Nema Vand speak with Andy.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Patriarch of Perfection
programme.desc: Meet the Chrisley family, where Todd Chrisley is king. He micromanages his family just like his business and always tries to stay five steps ahead of his five children.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Not So Sweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Savannah is turning sweet 16, and a big birthday bash is in the works. Todd has to come to grips with the fact that his little girl is growing into a young woman. At the party, Todd keeps a watchful eye on girl-crazy Chase.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Jugs and Ammo
programme.desc: Todd’s eldest daughter Lindsie broke his heart when she eloped with her now-husband, Will, without telling her family. While Lindsie recovers from plastic surgery, Todd and Will make an effort to find some common ground at the shooting range.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Two Men and a Baby
programme.desc: The Chrisleys welcome a new addition to the family: Baby Chloe. Chloe is Kyle's daughter, and she is coming to live with Todd and Julie while they teach Kyle 'Parenting 101.' Savannah and Chase get into a fender bender in Savannah's new car.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd-Tervention
programme.desc: The Chrisley's are off to their South Carolina lake house in celebration of Todd's mother, Faye's, birthday. To his kids' dismay, Todd confiscates all electronic devices to ensure a weekend of real family bonding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Big Apple Blowup
programme.desc: Todd takes Savannah and Chase to New York City to teach them about the family fashion business. Savannah proves to be a perfect student, but the only thing Chase learns is how to pick up models.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Le’ing with the Devil
programme.desc: Mike surprises Paulina with a birthday trip to Hawaii, and invites the whole crew along. Paulina plans a night out with the girls before the trip, while Nema and Mike prepare by getting Botox. Tensions boil over among the Shahs at an unforgettable Lu'au.

programme.title: Family Karma: Karma's a Beach
programme.desc: It's off to Key West for a weekend of fun, sun, and no supervision. Brian and Shaan butt heads, while Monica tests Anisha's patience with her 'good girl' image. Storm clouds gather when an innocent game takes a scandalous turn and Monica has had enough.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live
programme.desc: Mercedes Javid and Nema Vand speak with Andy.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: Not So Grey Gardens
programme.desc: A return client presents the unique challenge of landscaping four different outdoor spaces connected to her Greenwich Village town home. However, each space demands its own look and feel, and one job starts to feel like four, leading to a time crunch.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: A Change of Greenery
programme.desc: A limited budget will make it challenging for the Manscapers to meet their clients' needs, so sacrifices must be made. In the city, a quirky designer enlists the team for a landscaping project at a high-end hotel, one that must be completed in two days.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: The Concrete Jungle
programme.desc: The Manscapers get the chance to landscape the highly-anticipated pop-up restaurant Gitano, but struggle to find palm trees to realize their client's vision. A Brooklyn-based client and renowned designer pushes the team for a minimalist Zen garden.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: Thriller, Filler and Spiller
programme.desc: A suburban couple decides to spend big to give their family a dream backyard, but the project gets off to a rocky start. The plan for a massive new patio runs into underground complications and designing with kids in mind proves to be a struggle.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: Brides and Blooms
programme.desc: The Manscapers travel upstate to a working farm and vacation retreat owned by their friend Matt, to help him prepare for a wedding, but the farm has never hosted a wedding before, and a hurricane forced the couple to call off their ceremony once before.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Hashtag Sell This B*tch!
programme.desc: Josh Altman has high rollers from Chicago in town, looking to wheel and deal. If Altman can't find their dream house for an insane best deal, he'll walk away with nothing. James and David have re-strategized their listing with a giant open house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Two Tops Never Work
programme.desc: Flagg is forced to co-list with rival realtor (and 'Real Househusband') Mauricio Umansky. Tracy lands a dream listing in Brentwood that quickly turns into a nightmare, as Altman gets an offer on his mansion in the Bradbury Estates that just might work.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Homewood's Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Tracy battles two brokers from her past to sell a problematic listing in Brentwood. James lands a classic Beverly Hills home, but the owner has some old-school demands. Madison introduces Cody to the entire family, and pops a big question.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Who's Your Daddy?
programme.desc: Josh Flagg struggles to find the balance between planning his wedding and juggling over-the-top clients. Tracy has a listing with a first-time developer with high expectations. The Altmans race to the hospital as their baby daughter is born.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: It Wasn't in My Budget!
programme.desc: James and David make a pitch to represent the hottest new high rise building in Los Angeles. A wealthy socialite with tight purse strings sees Madison for a summer rental. Tracy's client wants to sell two properties, but has lofty expectations on price.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Mile High Club
programme.desc: Josh and Matt Altman land the biggest mansion in Bradbury Estates. Madison battles structural problems and mold to sell a friend's house in Brentwood. The Brits throw a party for their penthouse listings, but sparks fly when Altman and Flagg face off.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Keys to the Castle
programme.desc: Tracy heads to New York to be mentored by Fredrik Eklund, and to pitch herself to Douglas Elliman President Howard Lorber for a slew of new high-rise projects in L.A. Altman tackles the beast of Bradbury Estates, Bliss Canyon.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Love and Listings

programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Skate Circles Around Your Sister?
programme.desc: Live-action comedy following two siblings who host an online show to solve life’s issues.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have Mom Bust You Out?
programme.desc: When Mr. Walker gives Cami Saturday detention for something that wasn't her fault, she'll have to miss her big dance competition, unless she sneaks out. With her family's help, Cami attempts the most daring detention escape any student has ever tried.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Father of the Bribe
programme.desc: Sydney is excited when she makes the school's first girls' fencing team. But when she learns her dad helped Coach Carlock, Sydney fears she may have gotten on the team for the wrong reason.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Mrs. Harris' Opus
programme.desc: When Sydney and Olive accidentally destroy a very popular exhibit at the museum, their teacher Mrs. Harris is deemed at fault and in jeopardy of losing her job. The girls devise a plan to convince VP Virmani not to fire Mrs. Harris.

programme.title: Disney Fam Jam: Lee and Jacobs
programme.desc: A family dance competition where couples, and their kids, compete for prizes.

programme.title: Jessie: Caught Purple Handed
programme.desc: Jessie finds an agent who wants to be her hand model.

programme.title: Jessie: Understudied and Overdone
programme.desc: Jessie gets an opportunity to be the understudy for a famous, young actress.

programme.title: Jessie: Lizard Scales and Wrestling Tales
programme.desc: Luke is assigned a school report about his family history and asks his adoptive mom Christina for information about his birthparents.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part One: Frozen
programme.desc: When Booker freezes mid-vision, Raven takes him to Dr. Sleevemore, the same doctor who helped her when she was a teen.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part Two: Found
programme.desc: When Nia discovers that Booker’s visions went into her eye, Tess convinces her to keep the visions for the next couple of weeks.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sleevemore Part Three: Future
programme.desc: As Booker prepares for the vision transfer procedure, he learns Jasmine stole the visions from Nia the night before.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Inn Trouble
programme.desc: Camp Kikiwaka gets a surprise visitor...Hazel! Hazel says she's changed, so Lou agrees to let her hang out for a few days. The boys attempt to earn the camp’s highest honour.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lake Rancid
programme.desc: When a magazine contacts Destiny to do a story on her community service, Matteo, Gwen, and Finn help her clean only one area of the shore, hiding the rest of the trash.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Between A Raccoon and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Gwen befriends a group of campers called the "Extreme Team," known for their gutsy outdoor activities. They invite Gwen to hike to Dead Horse Drop, and she accepts.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Sister Pact
programme.desc: Sydney and her friends make a pact to go to the dance together without dates. She finds herself in a pickle when Ned asks her to the dance. Max recalls his first school dance when Leo and his mom gave him tips on how to ask a girl to be his date.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Golden State Killer: Main Suspect
programme.desc: After a decades long crime spree terrorizing California, a DNA breakthrough has led detectives to a suspect in one of the most famous cases in history. Stephanie Gosk, and detective Paul Holes, trace the life of suspect, Joe DeAngelo.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Momentos of Murder
programme.desc: When the Hillside Stranglers are caught police realize they still have another serial killer running rampant in Los Angeles. He tortures and toys with his model victims while keeping pieces of their jewelry as he snaps their last photo ever.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: An Appetite for Murder
programme.desc: Texas authorities have a killer riding the rails and leaving a literal trail of bread crumbs after eating at victims' tables. When more murders are linked, the FBI names a Most Wanted suspect and a national manhunt for 'The Railroad Killer' ensues.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bevers
programme.desc: Sheltered teen brothers Robert and Michael Bever idolized serial killers and dreamed of being the most prolific murderers in history. With an arsenal of weapons, their plan for notoriety begins at home in their quiet Oklahoma suburb.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Brileys
programme.desc: Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count. Even after their apprehension, these brothers prove difficult to contain.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Hog Trail Murders
programme.desc: After a husband and wife realize their dogs have been dragging human bones into their backyard, cops learn that a serial killer is using the nearby woods to indulge in his dark fantasies.

programme.title: Snapped: Deidra Griffin
programme.desc: When the decaying body of a Baltimore man is discovered in his garage, detectives use advanced law enforcement technology to pinpoint a cunning killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Mandy Smith
programme.desc: The search for a missing man leads police to his girlfriend and a host of secrets about their past.

programme.title: Snapped: Jordan Shaver
programme.desc: A suspicious fire and a secret lover lead officials to ask if the wife was involved.

programme.title: Snapped: Lois Kay Cloud
programme.desc: An Arizona farmer’s murder goes cold as speculation mounts about his wife’s secret life and the role of a mysterious con man.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: The Informant
programme.desc: In Southern California, law enforcement hunt for a serial killer who is targeting elderly women.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: Bayou Strangler
programme.desc: A serial predator terrorizes Southeastern Louisiana, strangling men to death and disposing of their bodies like trash.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Last Call Killer
programme.desc: In New Jersey four bodies are found dismembered, bagged, and thrown in roadside garbage cans. The 'Last Call Killer' hunted his victims openly in piano bars but no one suspected he could be hiding in plain sight, working as a local nurse.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: An Eye For Murder
programme.desc: Dallas police discover three women murdered with their eyes surgically removed. Police believe they have a deranged doctor on the loose. Two rookies are on the trail of a man with a Psycho-esque mother, a talent for taxidermy and a hatred for women.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Killer Caller
programme.desc: Twin Cities, MN, police are hunting for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness. No one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Deadly Summer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores. Police release surveillance footage to the press and ask the public for help to find a duffle bag wielding murderer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Dahmer on Dahmer: A Serial Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Dive into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Jeffrey Dahmer. With new revelations and never-before-seen interviews, the series sheds light on the grizzly and complicated investigation through the eyes of pivotal figures in the case.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Ted Bundy
programme.desc: In the 70’s, Ted Bundy brutally murdered at least 36 young women. Glamorized as a handsome, well-educated killer who outsmarted the law, was Bundy really an evil genius… or a con artist posing as privileged to hide the monster in plain sight.

programme.title: Killing Versace: The Hunt for a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The headline grabbing murder of fashion icon Gianni Versace sent detectives into a tireless chase for a serial killer. Now expert insights on the mind of Andrew Cunanan, and a deep dive by forensic and legal specialists.

programme.title: Kemper on Kemper: Inside The Mind of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Ed Kemper, also known as the Co-Ed Killer, murdered and dismembered 10 people, including his own mother. Former FBI agent John Douglas takes us through his extensive interviews with Kemper, which became the backbone of modern criminal psychology.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his team must work to clear the IMF's name after it is implicated in a bombing.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Simpsina
programme.desc: Lisa becomes a magician's apprentice to the legendary Great Raymondo, who helps her develop her craft. A schoolgirl crush clouds her judgment when she is coaxed into revealing the Great Raymondo's most famous magic trick to his phony arch nemesis.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Real Housewives of Fat Tony
programme.desc: Fat Tony and Selma are in love and get married after a whirlwind courtship. To ease Marge's reservations about the marriage, Fat Tony invites Homer and Marge to a weekend getaway at the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Scissorhands
programme.desc: When Homer discovers a genius talent for styling hair and opens his own salon, he becomes Springfield's most in-demand hair stylist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ned-Liest Catch
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for getting Mrs. Krabappel suspended after one of his school pranks, Bart helps her escape detention, and Ned Flanders winds up saving her life in the process.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Falcon and the D'Ohman
programme.desc: Homer befriends a reserved security guard recently hired by the nuclear power plant. Plagued by violent flashbacks from his past as a CIA agent, he must overcome his tortured nightmares to save Homer from a Ukrainian terrorist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Stops to Smell the Roosevelts
programme.desc: Principal Skinner challenges superintendent Gary Chalmers to take over Bart's education after one of Bart's pranks leads to a school fundraiser debacle.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Replaceable You
programme.desc: Bart's science fair project, a mechanical baby seal, outshines Lisa's asteroid model and becomes a popular pet among the retirement home patrons.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Food Wife
programme.desc: Marge takes Bart and Lisa on a weekend excursion and when an unexpected restaurant detour awakens their taste buds, fellow foodies inspire them to start a food blog.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Book Job
programme.desc: Lisa becomes disheartened when she learns the shocking truth behind the 'tween lit' industry and her beloved fantasy novel characters, but Homer decides to cash in on the craze and forms a team to group-write the next 'tween lit' hit.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Gene Mile
programme.desc: When the kids have to run a mandatory mile for school on free-ice-cream-day, they hatch an elaborate plot to sneak away. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda frantically try to secure discount tickets to a show at the Wharf Arts Center.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Yes Without My Zeke
programme.desc: When Zeke gets in trouble, the Belcher kids and Jimmy Jr. pitch in to help prevent him being sent to a disciplinary school. However, Tina tries to thwart their mission, so she can have Jimmy Jr. and his butt all to herself.

programme.title: Family Guy: Emmy-Winning Episode
programme.desc: Tired of not winning an Emmy, Peter embarks on his own For Your Consideration campaign for Family Guy by making the show more like Emmy-winning shows and no category is off limits.

programme.title: Family Guy: Foxx in the Men House
programme.desc: Peter becomes friends with a cool, handsome paramedic named Stryker Foxx. Wrapped up in his newfound 'coolness,' he soon dumps Quagmire, Joe and Cleveland.

programme.title: Archer: Double Indecency
programme.desc: A bar fight is launched to determine who's sexier.

programme.title: Archer: Liquid Lunch
programme.desc: The on-again, off-again relationship of Archer and Slater causes a rift in the on-again, off-again relationship of Archer and Lana.

programme.title: Movie: Suburbicon
programme.desc: When a house is burgled in the middle of the night, the idyllic 1950s community of Suburbicon is shocked to its core, especially when one of the victims is killed. As her husband deals with the aftermath, an insurance investigator becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his team must work to clear the IMF's name after it is implicated in a bombing.

programme.title: Movie: A League of Their Own

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: Movie: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: Two sisters join the first female professional baseball league during the Second World War and struggle to help it succeed despite their growing sibling rivalry.

programme.title: Movie: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: Following his master's death, a squire enters a jousting competition in medieval England.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Yellowstone
programme.desc: In 1985, wolves were released back into Yellowstone National Park. The re-introduction of the predator has set off a cascade of events through the food chain.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: How the South Pacific islands has affected human culture.

programme.title: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: Learn how some of the most isolated islands became habited.

programme.title: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: Much of the South Pacific is a marine desert, but some areas support diverse life. Following how the ocean creatures survive the harsh conditions they live in.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Volcanoes
programme.desc: The birth, growth and death of an island in the South Pacific.

programme.title: South Pacific: Strange Islands
programme.desc: On the isolated islands of the South Pacific, wildlife has evolved in extraordinary ways, but island living may carry a high price because when new species arrive, all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Madagascar: Island of Marvels
programme.desc: Examine clues from Madagascar's animals, plants and landscape to discover how the island's past has produced its present; the Tsingy have cut off animals in isolated gorges allowing them to evolve unique species.

programme.title: Madagascar: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The narrow eastern strip of the island is rich in life; travel from the highest mountains, where trees are few, to lush rainforests, to the tropical coast, home to ring-tailed lemurs, jewelled geckos and predatory wasps.

programme.title: Madagascar: Land of Heat and Dust
programme.desc: Some of the strategies for survival in Madagascar's dry south are ingenious.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island Extended Stay: Sufferin' County
programme.desc: A female inmate, known for fighting, finds love with an alleged gang leader, and staff must prepare for their jailhouse wedding. And, one of the jail’s most powerful inmates must choose between his crime family and his real family.

programme.title: Lockup: Cincinnati Extended Stay: Dead Run
programme.desc: A heroin addict must choose between the lifestyle she craves and the young son she has left behind. Another seasoned female inmate is transferred back to the jail from state prison, but she suddenly finds herself on the wrong end of a fist.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey Extended Stay: Going Postal
programme.desc: A new inmate tries to adjust to life in jail, but finds himself with a target on his back and the victim of violence. Then, a drug smuggling scheme is uncovered in the jail's mailroom, and a suspect is identified.

programme.title: Lockup: Maricopa County Extended Stay: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: No matter the circumstances that brought them there, Maricopa County Jail in Phoenix, Arizona, will have a profound effect on who the inmates will become. And for some, their time in jail will reveal their true nature.

programme.title: Lockup: San Antonio Extended Stay: Defiance
programme.desc: Gang members disrupt a housing unit, and when inmates flood their cells, the Special Emergency Response Team, or SERT, takes action, placing one inmate in special restraints.

programme.title: Lockup: Savannah Extended Stay: Wis-Dumb
programme.desc: A planned romantic weekend turns into a nightmare for one young couple. Then, a fight sends two women to segregation, and for one of the combatants, the isolation takes its toll.

programme.title: Lockup: Grand Rapids Extended Stay: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Grand Rapids, Michigan ranks highly in most quality of life categories.

programme.title: Lockup: Maricopa County Extended Stay: Identity Crisis
programme.desc: No matter the circumstances that brought them there, Maricopa County Jail in Phoenix, Arizona, will have a profound effect on who the inmates will become. And for some, their time in jail will reveal their true nature.

programme.title: Lockup: San Antonio Extended Stay: Defiance
programme.desc: Gang members disrupt a housing unit, and when inmates flood their cells, the Special Emergency Response Team, or SERT, takes action, placing one inmate in special restraints.

programme.title: Lockup: Grand Rapids Extended Stay: Outcast
programme.desc: An inmate tries to leave jail the hard way. And a female inmate, convicted of her fifth drunk driving charge, could lose everything. Plus, an outcast inmate makes a comment that leads to violence and panic.

programme.title: Lockup: Grand Rapids Extended Stay: And Baby Make Three?
programme.desc: An inmate, who performs violence-themed rap on stage, is in jail for assaulting his girlfriend and is about to return to the streets. Another inmate worker deals with the pressures of creating the jail’s most popular dish.

programme.title: Lockup: Tulsa Extended Stay: Shackled Love
programme.desc: One inmate's troubled past leads to angry outbursts inside the jail, while another arrives after an alleged crime spree that sounds like it's right out of a movie. And a young mother could go to prison if she's found guilty of robber.

programme.title: Lockup: Tulsa Extended Stay: No Escape
programme.desc: The story of a criminal legend, the family he left behind, and the devastating consequences of his decisions.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Reality Bites
programme.desc: We tell the story of the early '90s growing obsession with sex, celebrity and reality TV. While some women, like Anita Hill, are fighting against becoming sex objects, others like Anna Nicole Smith can’t wait to get their clothes off.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Enemy Within
programme.desc: As the '90s progress, America becomes more divided and fragmented. In Waco, an obscure religious cult becomes a lightning rod for a fear of big government invading our homes.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: In the '90s, new attitudes and new technology equal more freedom, more fragmentation, more diversity, but also more conflict.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Exposed
programme.desc: It’s the countdown to the end of the century and the party of all parties, but pre-millennium tension is rising.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: The Countdown
programme.desc: The world falls in love with a heartbroken Princess Diana and grieves her passing. Americans are shocked by the senseless killings at Columbine, and surprised by the 1998 midterm elections. 'The West Wing' reaches TV screens; Lewinsky affair continues.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Lift Off
programme.desc: See how the '80s created our modern world including the revolution in personal entertainment brought on by Pac-Man and Sony Walkmans while a new kid on the block defined a new musical era - spelled 'MTV.'

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: The Revolutionaries
programme.desc: Reagan's business mandate leads to a new breed of entrepreneurs, including Steve Jobs, whose '1984' ad helped launch the Super Bowl commercial craze and Ted Turner, who invented the 24-hour news network.

programme.desc: A distant planet shows evidence of an Earth-like atmosphere, while a mysterious glowing light suggests the impossible - an atmosphere on the Moon. Have we found evidence of a crashed alien ship on the asteroid belt and why are there blueberries on Mars?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: CIA's Secret Revenge
programme.desc: When the Soviet Union unveils its own space shuttle, the CIA hatches a secret revenge plot. Recent discoveries shed new light on the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah. A missing nuclear weapon could threaten a NASA base in the Arctic.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Planet Killer
programme.desc: A mission to Mars captures an image of a strange structure on the Red Planet. Files from the first Apollo mission record an eerie sighting on the dark side of the moon. A planet-eating star gives scientists a glimpse of Earth's terrible demise.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Sun's Evil Twin
programme.desc: Two suns photographed in the sky over Indonesia could be a trick of light, or the first sighting of the Sun's evil twin; NASA scientists are baffled by ghostly white swirls on the Moon's surface.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Alien Signals
programme.desc: NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, and experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact. However, some fear that such a discovery could have apocalyptic consequences.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Pluto's Evil Twin
programme.desc: After NASA's New Horizons spacecraft flies by Pluto, it encounters a strange alien world that shuts down the probe's computers, and experts investigate if this mysterious object is an alien spacecraft hiding at the edge of our solar system.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Red Planet
programme.desc: Three cosmonauts die mysteriously as they re-enter Earth's atmosphere and NASA needs to know why. A declassified document reveals a CIA plan to use a space disaster as a cover to start World War 3. A NASA rover discovers clues that help solve a murder.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth, and what would happen if it ever entered our solar system.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Christie/ Victor
programme.desc: A mother and nursing student stops her anxiety medication abruptly, causing her to become delusional. After breaking into a home and stealing a car, she leads police on a high-speed pursuit.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Maston/ Young
programme.desc: A man who had it all loses everything after his wife leaves him, taking their only child with her. Despondent over the loss, he robs a gas station and then leads police on a high-speed chase through the city streets of Indianapolis.

programme.desc: A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. His infatuation leads to obsession and when their secret affair is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal.

programme.title: Betrayed: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: After Marilyn Reza, a church-going mother of two is found dead in her home, investigators turn their attention to the members of her local church. However, a secret confession at her funeral brings the true murderer to light.

programme.title: Betrayed: Suited for Murder

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire

programme.title: Betrayed: Little Shop of Horrors

programme.title: Betrayed: Kiss of Death

programme.title: Betrayed: Strangled by Love

programme.title: Betrayed: Two's Company, Three is Murder
programme.desc: From the outside, 34-year-old Linda Singleton's life appears picture perfect. Little does everyone know Linda is engaged in a deadly love triangle. When the affair comes to light, her 'perfect' life comes to an untimely end.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Watch Those Country Girls
programme.desc: Ex-con Roger Delucenay is locked up in county jail. When his brother is sent there a few months later, the two carry out a daring escape. They run to Kentucky to lay low but when a jealous ex rats them out, the two are forced to run again to stay free.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Family Recipes
programme.desc: Some secret family recipes are just meant to be shared, like the secret behind Graeter's rich and creamy ice cream. Get the lowdown on how Mrs. T's Pierogies turned a classic Polish dish into the American dream.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Game Day Munchies
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a fantasy league of snacks. Clear off the coffee table for Home Run Inn's Meat Lovers Pizza and the cheese and caramel popcorn mix from Garrett's in Chicago.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Let It Roll
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro finds there just about anything can be rolled in La Chiquita's Tomato and Basil Tortilla. He also discovers how Stuckey's Pecan Log Roll evolved from a sweet treat sold from the trunk of a car, into a roadside classic.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Secret Center
programme.desc: Join host Alfonso Ribeiro as he explores foods with secret centers. From the gooey middle of the Mallo Cup to the creamy goodness of a peppermint cream or the surprisingly complex filling in a Mini Beef Wellington.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Southern Treats
programme.desc: In the land of Dixie, see how a few of the favorite sweet Southern treats are made. Watch GooGoo Clusters take a bath in chocolate; Red Bird Peppermint Puffs earn their stripes, and find out the sweet secret behind Carolina Foods' Honeybun.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet and Sour
programme.desc: Pucker up and rev up your sweet tooth as host Alfonso Ribeiro explore snacks with the tongue-tingling twist of sweet and sour!

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking checks out the best surf-and-turf dishes in restaurants across America. He joins chefs to learn how to put amazing combinations together including the classic lobster tail and steak, clam and bacon pizza, and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Bacon
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases the towering BLTs, juicy bacon burgers, pizzas, pies, pancakes and more with the 12 tastiest bacon dishes in America.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Global Flavors of Texas

programme.title: Man Fire Food: West Coast Roasts
programme.desc: Visiting the Passmore Ranch in Sloughhouse, Roger must try to catch a fish by hand. Also, at the Santa Maria Elks Lodge, he will assist in building a fire pit for cooking up some beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wilderness Cooking
programme.desc: Roger visits the Jack Mountain Bushcraft School in Masardis, Maine where the owner and wilderness guide Tim Smith teaches him how to create a rustic kitchen outdoors.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireplace Feasts
programme.desc: Roger loves cooking in a fireplace. He visits two places in New England that host fireplace feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Playing With Fire in New England
programme.desc: Roger meets two people in New England who love to play with fire. In Plymouth, Massachusetts, Paula Marcoux has a backyard full of cooking contraptions inspired by her travels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Spring Celebration in Kentucky
programme.desc: Richard McCallister invites Roger to his annual spring celebration in Lancaster, Kentucky. Richard and Roger cook a flock of spring chicken in their outdoor contraption.

programme.desc: Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are eating when Mermaid Man accidentally drops his belt.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon Sleeps/ Fireworks School
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: World Day/ Between a Rope and a Hard Place
programme.desc: To celebrate 'World Day' and win a trip, the Chipmunks each get a country to represent for a school presentation. Then, Coach Dobkins kicks Cheesy and Theodore off the track team for being slow, but Theodore is determined to compete.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Tree House/ Saving Simon
programme.desc: While cleaning out their treehouse, the girls remember how they made it their home. Believing Simon is going away to a boarding school, Alvin and Theodore do all they can to stop his departure and keep him at home.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Rumblr
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger set up profiles on a match-making app for heroes and villains. The two of them then set up a double-fight with new villains.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Cave the Date
programme.desc: Henry and the gang set up an underground restaurant for Charlotte's dinner with Jack Swagger. Some unwanted guests crash the party when they heat Jack Swagger is in town.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Game of Phones
programme.desc: When a young girl chains herself outside of Junk-N-Stuff, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to help find her beloved phone. While on a stakeout, they unexpectedly run across some familiar faces with a devious plan they weren't prepared for.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Mad Wax/ Fails
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are attacked by wax figures at the Celebrity Wax Museum. And, Brad posts embarrassing videos of Captain Man and Kid Dangers until they turn him invisible again.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Tiny Toddler/ Magical Beefery Tour
programme.desc: After misplacing the shrink ray, Captain Man and Kid Danger have to battle The Toddler to win it back. Captain man and Kid Danger find a golden pickle in their burger which wins them a private tour of the secretive factory where Beefo's Burgers are made.

programme.title: The Adventures of Kid Danger: Fish Talker/ Wet Doom
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger use Schowz' Fish-Talker helmet to help a lost fish find his way home. While stuck in a restaurant bathroom, Ray, Henry, Charlotte, Jasper, and Schwoz reminisce about past adventures.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theozilla/ Doggone It
programme.desc: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant. Later, when all the phones at school are missing, Alvin is blamed and he tries to clear his name.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Jeanette's Secret Garden/ Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead.When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croner's basement, the Chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Small Carol/ Last Man Floating
programme.desc: The Mayor and Carol work late when all manor of strange events begin to happen. Extreme Sports host, Dynamo, holds a competition to see who will go on the City Mars mission.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Slam the Door/ JAILBREAK!
programme.desc: Harl attempts to prevent Tippy from bringing the fabled 'Mars Door' back to Earth. Tippy Dorman, faces the trial of the century after his attempt to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Haunted and Hunted!
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible; but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crocker Shocker/ Super Zero

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Portal Jacked! / Warren and Hypno, Sitting in a Tree

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Garage Tales/ Animal Farm
programme.desc: After finding a box of mementos, Gramma tells the kids the story of her greatest adventure. While the Greens are away, the animals compete to see who will rule the farm.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Family Legacy/ Paint Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Gramma tells Cricket and Tilly that there’s treasure buried on their property.

programme.title: Black-ish: 30 Something

programme.desc: An urgent problem leads Mel and Maggie to seek help from their father, while Macy discovers a shocking secret about her past.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Vows
programme.desc: With only four weeks left before the wedding, Chandler is still struggling with his vows.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Glasses
programme.desc: George's stolen glasses set off a bizarre chain of events for everyone. Elaine is afraid of dogs after being bitten by one.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Mike and Molly's Excellent Adventure

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Call Me When You Get There
programme.desc: When Barry receives his first driver's licence, Beverly lays out the rules about using the car, including the most important: 'Call me when you get there!' After Barry disobeys his mother and gets in trouble, he decides to lie about his whereabouts.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Girl Talk

programme.title: Movie: Johnny English Strikes Again
